clean_body: And we're defending him in court! And we're defending him in court! | | | Fellow American, I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate against false criminal charges. Please let me explain. In the early morning of September 23, roughly twenty-five FBI agents wearing tactical gear threatened to break down the door of Mark Houck's home if he didn't let them in immediately. With guns pointed at Mark, they hauled him off to jail while his wife and kids looked on, screaming. Now he's facing multiple criminal charges and eleven years in federal prison due to an incident involving an aggressively abusive Planned Parenthood escort – which is why our team is representing him in court. Mark is a dedicated pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor. He would drive two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for six to eight hours at a time, praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son. But one day, a Planned Parenthood escort got in his young son's face, ridiculing him and his father in very vulgar and aggressive ways. Mark defended his son by shoving the escort away after having repeatedly asked him to stop the abuse. The escort wanted him prosecuted for assault and battery for shoving him away from Mark's young son, but the District Court of Philadelphia threw out the case. So, Biden's Department of Justice charged Mark with violating the federal FACE Act... and now this courageous pro-life hero faces up to eleven years in federal prison for advocating for life and for defending his family. We're pulling out all the stops to make sure the DOJ and the abortion clinic escort who are trying to destroy Mark and his family don't get away with this. But this is going to be a long, costly affair, and I need your help. Make no mistake, friend, Mark's arrest was a targeted attack specifically intended to intimidate pro-lifers and people of faith. The incident at the abortion clinic was so minor that the authorities refused to press charges and when the escort filed charges himself, his case was thrown out. Fortunately for Mark and his family, if anyone has experience defending pro-life heroes against Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood, it's us. My name is Tom Brejcha and I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society – the not-for-profit law firm defending Mark Houck. We're proud to have defended many renowned leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe Scheidler and the Pro-Life Action League, David Bereit, David Daleiden, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, Lila Rose and Live Action, the March for Life, and many more. But without the help of generous donors, none of our crucial work would be possible. Because the reality is, while you can't be the one personally defending Mark in the courtroom, by donating you can help us vindicate this brave father and pro-life hero who is being ground through the system in an unjust prosecution. I will be grateful for whatever you're able to send today. Whether it's $10, $40, $60, $250 or more... ...because time is of the essence. We're expecting Mark's defense to cost us hundreds of thousands of dollars. To put it as bluntly as possible, Mark could be facing years behind bars for a crime he didn't commit, while his seven children grow up without him and his wife Ryan-Marie is forced to raise their family alone. Not only that, but pro-life sidewalk counselors across the country may be deterred from going to the clinics out of concern that they, too, could end up in costly legal battles and even face federal charges simply for defending the unborn. So, I do ask that you make your gift as soon as you can. I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get your generous gift so I can let Mark know that you're standing with him. I know Mark and his family will be deeply touched by your generous support. May God bless you, Tom Brejcha President & Chief Counsel P.S. Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood want to destroy pro-life, father-of-seven Mark Houck and intimidate people of faith everywhere. They'd love to see Mark rotting away in federal prison for his selfless devotion to the unborn, using his defense of his young son as the excuse. You and I cannot let that happen. | | | (C) Thomas More Society | 309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

#

Team, With only a few weeks left in 2022, we want to take a moment to recap and celebrate our victories throughout the year. This spring, **we fully renewed the _Violence Against Women Act_ until 2027** for the first time since it expired in 2019. A top issue for Kyrsten and our team, the renewal of this landmark law provides funding for life-saving services and programs protecting Arizona's women and families from violence and empowers survivors with essential support services like health care and housing. In June, **you joined Kyrsten in our efforts to pass our historic _Bipartisan Safer Communities_ law to reduce community violence and save lives** by investing in mental health services for children and families, protecting survivors of domestic violence, and funding school-based mental health and supportive services, school safety resources, and more. We came together to pass **the _PACT Act_ , legislation that ensures veterans exposed to toxins get the health care they’ve earned and expands their eligibility for VA health care services for five years.** Our bill provides all veterans with toxic exposure screenings, increases toxic-exposure training for VA employees, and ensures the VA reaches out to the veteran community about toxic exposure so veterans are aware of what services are available. **Kyrsten led a bipartisan effort to pass the _Chips and Science Act_ into law.** Strengthening our country’s economy is one of her priorities, and this legislation does just that by investing $52 billion to boost American semiconductor manufacturing, solving supply chain challenges, and creating thousands of jobs in Arizona — expanding America’s leadership in innovation, research, and development. **We secured $4 billion for drought resiliency for Western States** helping to secure our state’s water future as we continue to grow and thrive. **We brought down healthcare costs for everyday Arizonans** by lowering Medicare drug costs for seniors and capping prices for life-saving insulin. And **our landmark _Respect for Marriage Act_ is headed to the President’s desk to be signed into law this week.** This legislation will safeguard marriage equality for same-sex and interracial couples, while protecting religious freedom. It’s been an incredible year, and we’re proud of everything we’ve achieved together. Now, as we look ahead into 2023, we look forward to continuing to deliver results for Arizonans and people across the country. _Your support in this work helps us build on our accomplishments and get more done for everyday families. _ [**Will you add a donation of any amount to help us keep delivering results in the Senate? body:
We can win again IF we start now. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55880850/383104538/-744169294?refcode=Header&ms=Header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmVkNjUzMS00ZjdhLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R9iND7Xj0tfi99684TtsoFVxk-C14cWdmMmlhhMUwsI=&emci=1c9b10e9-397a-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=ffed6531-4f7a-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=8943725) Peter,

Don't you hate it when someone rains on your parade?

We're still feeling the afterglow of Senator Warnock's big win, but _FiveThirtyEight_ just reminded us that **"Republicans Still Have A Clear Path To Retaking The Senate In 2024,"** and the _Washington Post_ says, **"Senate Democrats had a good 2022. The 2024 election could be brutal."**

We’re not going to let those headlines get us down. **We're going to keep building momentum and prove that we're ready to re-elect Bob and defend our majority.**

[**We need to raise $50,000 by the December 31st Federal Election Commission deadline to prepare for 2024. We're starting by raising $25,000 by Thursday night. We're still feeling the afterglow of Senator Warnock's big win, but FiveThirtyEight just reminded us that "Republicans Still Have A Clear Path To Retaking The Senate In 2024," and the Washington Post says, "Senate Democrats had a good 2022. The 2024 election could be brutal." We’re not going to let those headlines get us down. name: Tom Brejcha
subject: This is an assault on every pro-life American
body:
And we're defending him in court!
And we're defending him in court!

| | | Fellow American, I need your immediate support to help the Thomas More Society defend a father-of-seven pro-life advocate against false criminal charges. Please let me explain. In the early morning of September 23, roughly twenty-five FBI agents wearing tactical gear threatened to break down the door of Mark Houck's home if he didn't let them in immediately. **With guns pointed at Mark, they hauled him off to jail while his wife and kids looked on, screaming.** Now he's facing multiple criminal charges and eleven years in federal prison due to an incident involving an aggressively abusive Planned Parenthood escort – which is why our team is representing him in court. [**Can I count on your best gift of $40 or more to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND to help us give him the legal defense he deserves?**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z00hs3bajo1270k5tj6s7dsah1gks7hi92vlevgg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3hm6oj4clh2bs) Mark is a dedicated pro-life author, speaker, and sidewalk counselor. He would drive two hours every week to stand outside of abortion clinics for six to eight hours at a time, praying the Rosary and offering support to women who are so desperate they think they have no alternative than to abort their babies, often bringing his twelve-year-old son. But one day, **a Planned Parenthood escort got in his young son's face, ridiculing him and his father in very vulgar and aggressive ways**. Mark defended his son by shoving the escort away after having repeatedly asked him to stop the abuse. The escort wanted him prosecuted for assault and battery for shoving him away from Mark's young son, but the District Court of Philadelphia threw out the case. So, Biden's Department of Justice charged Mark with violating the federal FACE Act...** _and now this courageous pro-life hero faces up to eleven years in federal prison for advocating for life and for defending his family._** We're pulling out all the stops to make sure the DOJ and the abortion clinic escort who are trying to destroy Mark and his family don't get away with this. But this is going to be a long, costly affair, and I need your help. [**That's where your emergency donation to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND comes in – by giving today you can stand with Mark in his hour of need.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zuftqoi4ss3j8jpofvfcu9nmg0gmsb06frb38e1g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3hm6oj4clh2bs) Make no mistake, friend, Mark's arrest was a targeted attack specifically intended to intimidate pro-lifers and people of faith. The incident at the abortion clinic was so minor that the authorities refused to press charges and when the escort filed charges himself, his case was thrown out. Fortunately for Mark and his family, if anyone has experience defending pro-life heroes against Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood, it's us. My name is Tom Brejcha and I'm the president and chief counsel of the Thomas More Society – the not-for-profit law firm defending Mark Houck. We're proud to have defended many renowned leaders in America's pro-life movement such as Joe Scheidler and the Pro-Life Action League, David Bereit, David Daleiden, Shawn Carney and 40 Days for Life, Abby Johnson, the Susan B. Anthony List, Lila Rose and Live Action, the March for Life, and many more. But without the help of generous donors, none of our crucial work would be possible. Because the reality is, while you can't be the one personally defending Mark in the courtroom, by donating you can help us vindicate this brave father and pro-life hero who is being ground through the system in an unjust prosecution. **[Can I count on your gift of $40, $60, $100, or more to stand with Mark Houck today and fight back against the dark forces of Planned Parenthood?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z5oc80lgdh4rjupnoreh9kcf7mic5lprjl4to8o0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3hm6oj4clh2bs) ** I will be grateful for whatever you're able to send today. Whether it's $10, $40, $60, $250 or more... ...because time is of the essence. We're expecting Mark's defense to cost us hundreds of thousands of dollars. To put it as bluntly as possible, **_Mark could be facing years behind bars for a crime he didn't commit, while his seven children grow up without him and his wife Ryan-Marie is forced to raise their family alone._** Not only that, but pro-life sidewalk counselors across the country may be deterred from going to the clinics out of concern that they, too, could end up in costly legal battles and even face federal charges simply for defending the unborn. So, I do ask that you make your gift as soon as you can. [**Please don't delay in donating to the MARK HOUCK DEFENSE FUND immediately.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zvsu6qerfdbcrdq23hi6mkjonneevt9kjp6shqn0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3hm6oj4clh2bs)
I've asked my staff to let me know as soon as we get your generous gift so I can let Mark know that you're standing with him. I know Mark and his family will be deeply touched by your generous support. May God bless you,
---
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zlu843nquio096hscec0d2t5jg5eem663p3fmajo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3hm6oj4clh2bs)
---
Tom Brejcha
President & Chief Counsel
---
P.S. Biden's DOJ and Planned Parenthood want to destroy pro-life, father-of-seven Mark Houck and intimidate people of faith everywhere. They'd love to see Mark rotting away in federal prison for his selfless devotion to the unborn, using his defense of his young son as the excuse. You and I cannot let that happen. [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqd7cbv2240mv76t9sbt4gn5busqkm6l030d5200_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3hm6oj4clh2bs)[**Can I count on you to support the official criminal defense of Mark Houck with a tax-deductible donation today?**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zdfifivus6dp7ubpccs0snb1rk2akmucqvasbvq8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3hm6oj4clh2bs)
---
[** DONATE
**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zpo4v5p3athdccmc7kumntm8i96ug3sbm1b9kbgo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3hm6oj4clh2bs)
---
| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrqc4do9fpefgmdqv5dd059ramoa90nh55d3u29o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3hm6oj4clh2bs)
---
[Please consider supporting our efforts with a generous, tax-deductible donation.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6daleaoe1hjnkuq0hnf6q1bg3ej1usucft6f0qg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3hm6oj4clh2bs) (C) Thomas More Society | [www.thomasmoresociety.org](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zf4dot9bvebsiq525l65nl8ou1osu7fspu8el66g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3hm6oj4clh2bs)
309 W. Washington Street Suite 1250, Chicago, IL 60606

subject: What issues do you care about?

What you have to say and the issues you care about mean so much to me because your priorities are my priorities.

[**So please, if you can, take two minutes to fill out my short priorities survey >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55881980/383109163/638755381?refcode=EM_PET_221212issues_N_MK_45DA_5_NG_N_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmMxMGM2My01MzdhLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J9Ydpsa7wwRIBIV3lB4jktGeBgUbKNc78bMOflkOjZQ=&emci=0fc0ec5a-367a-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=22c10c63-537a-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=2814549)

Marcy Kaptur

| Peter, it's clear that the REAL reason these Silicon Valley Woketopians on a power trip wanted me gone is this - I don't cave in to their preferred left-wing agenda.
It's the same reason why they ultimately kicked Trump off, too...
They can't STAND that there are fighters out there who unapologetically push back against the woke mob - so they do everything they can to SILENCE US!!

But remember, Peter - it's not me who they're REALLY after. They are after YOU. I'm just in the way.

And I need to know right now: [do you want the upcoming Republican Majority to actually have a BACKBONE, and PROSECUTE all who were involved in this Twitter campaign of Election Rigging and blatant Free Speech violations?!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001owY2LJ-r6nQToRfkf_9_b8OFOeynyIt9OfifIqZD5EBqdn9RmnTp85V71Akc3Z06dq33f9QCo0WCrU6MnYKaUYEs_5h6dsAOTo1iq6UaTqPxMq5GfSQUzMINQ7VtW41VXeS8fndUnC4qfzzv8PnAJJb4jrkKl7rpvIY9rbIaMDKNOiSSFXGoaZlSMYV3ZZS_jvLFPylROUYV1GWy3Z4qgwNQjKCNuUIv&c=ckcwhDaFyCEJLGClniy53pWtV9acmSyeabw9zg3ZGZj-JJfuQ0nVwQ==&ch=9zuDd5kUFbfNoi0464AQJsCAnTYcjeOu7YceBhuLN1kYiZ4NVTqpaA==)

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The 2023 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional is here
body:
As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0271%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=IzGNajEIKEjeuvFRxmSmMw&sysid=1)
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42426%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XMwiSSGxBicwGcZPibSrEA&sysid=1)
---
Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That’s why I’ve written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we’ll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* From January to February, we’ll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we’ll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we’ll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we’ll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---
[Request your 2023 Daily Devotional](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42427%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lse%2f0mAYHCQBoUYI9eLleQ&sysid=1)
---
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42428%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8BAdcnofIJawIdJKxgc9Iw&sysid=1)
---
| The _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day.
---
| | We’re offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ this month. **And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31.** To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/light-in-the-darkness-matching-challenge/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c42429%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8xLQdn%2b6eFbkxuwuf4lCHQ&sysid=1) What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? What do you think we would accomplish? I’m excited to find out. Thanks for your partnership with this ministry. Sharing the Truth of God’s Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0271%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=IzGNajEIKEjeuvFRxmSmMw&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0271%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=IzGNajEIKEjeuvFRxmSmMw&sysid=1)

name: American Defense News
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2znccl1dski3ugh6rabdk02c8flh3gf57j1s28u28_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3hm1o36c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3oent8ng528mc9qmcb1dggcup2dh1gatp89sjpg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3hm1o36c1h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zje64pr88phqmv8guoe8i7srf8e9b0vduja0n8kg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3hm1o36c1h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3qaqsbo577g93k9ts09722haoqtj4sqdoddsd8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3hm1o36c1h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, [please use this preferences page](https://e.americandefensenews.com/prefs/9z2zc5av107rlhm7353kj6vvesh738be6na210hueho).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: AOTL SCOTUS Update
subject: Justice Kagan:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
“This is a theory with big consequences.”
|
---

During Wednesday’s oral argument on _Moore v. Harper_ , Justice Elena Kagan said that the “independent state legislature” theory would have big consequences.

Justice Kagan: “This is a proposal that gets rid of normal checks and balances on the way big governmental decisions are made in this country... [**And you might think that it gets rid of normal checks and balances at exactly the time when they are needed most.”**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55882291/383110338/1243905992?refcode=20221212_AOTL_F_mvh5__Actives&source=20221212_AOTL_F_mvh5__Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEwNGFjMDc4LTU1N2EtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TUTP6W3o3Re_5KJCgFXZzGRLc8Ra6QE8tmv4Kr7czzo=)

**[If you agree that we need checks and balances in our elections, add your name to our petition.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55882292/383110339/-1462679232?source=20221212_AOTL_F_mvh5__Actives&refcode=20221212_AOTL_F_mvh5__Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEwNGFjMDc4LTU1N2EtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TUTP6W3o3Re_5KJCgFXZzGRLc8Ra6QE8tmv4Kr7czzo=&emci=849ba8c3-4b7a-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=a04ac078-557a-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=8431045)** **[Or chip in $5 to support All on the Line’s work to protect democracy.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55882293/383110340/1243905992?refcode=20221212_AOTL_F_mvh5__Actives&source=20221212_AOTL_F_mvh5__Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEwNGFjMDc4LTU1N2EtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TUTP6W3o3Re_5KJCgFXZzGRLc8Ra6QE8tmv4Kr7czzo=)**

We’ve seen unprecedented attempts from anti-democratic extremists to silence voters and secure their own political power. If SCOTUS opens the door for the ISL theory, it will only be easier for them to subvert democracy.

Justice Kagan brought up concerns about legislators enacting restrictions on voting, eliminating voter protections, and obstructing election certifications -- this is why she said implementing the ISL theory would have **big consequences.**

**[No matter how SCOTUS decides this case, we know extremists will continue their attacks on free and fair elections. Make a donation to help AOTL hold them accountable.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55882294/383110341/1243905992?source=20221212_AOTL_F_mvh5__Actives&refcode=20221212_AOTL_F_mvh5__Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEwNGFjMDc4LTU1N2EtZWQxMS04MTljLTAwMGQzYTllYjQ3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TUTP6W3o3Re_5KJCgFXZzGRLc8Ra6QE8tmv4Kr7czzo=)**

clean_body: “This is a theory with big consequences.” | During Wednesday’s oral argument on Moore v. Harper , Justice Elena Kagan said that the “independent state legislature” theory would have big consequences. Justice Kagan: “This is a proposal that gets rid of normal checks and balances on the way big governmental decisions are made in this country... = = We’ve seen unprecedented attempts from anti-democratic extremists to silence voters and secure their own political power. If SCOTUS opens the door for the ISL theory, it will only be easier for them to subvert democracy. Justice Kagan brought up concerns about legislators enacting restrictions on voting, eliminating voter protections, and obstructing election certifications -- this is why she said implementing the ISL theory would have big consequences. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = We know history is on our side. Justice Kagan even referenced the recent SCOTUS decisions that support the past 100 years of legal precedent. But we also know the fight is not over. name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: End child mutilation now
body:
Imagine a world where a doctor decides to amputate your child’s leg to cure appendicitis.
| |
---
| | My fellow concerned American,Imagine a world where a doctor decides to amputate your child’s leg to cure appendicitis._Ridiculous, dangerous, and irresponsible_ ... right? Now... imagine a world where that doctor is praised for his or her “bravery” and for giving your child the body he or she was “always meant to have.”I paint a disturbing picture. But this is happening under our noses. **Except it’s not amputations for appendicitis -- it's double mastectomies, chemical castration drugs, and genitalia mutilation surgeries for children with gender dysphoria.** The Center for American Liberty is now actively engaged in legal action against Kaiser Permanente Hospital for physically mutilating and destroying the health of an innocent girl – Chloe Cole – after convincing her that she needed to be a boy to survive.**I need your help to fund this legal battle.**[**Will you donate an urgent $35 or more tax-deductible gift today to the Center for American Liberty to help cover our lawyer fees, months of research, and expert witness costs?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z87hrr7va11k9upr5bi3ph4ster7qllcvaq0so60_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3hm1o36c9h2bs) Before you decide to donate today, let me briefly share with you the details on this case.When Chloe Cole was 13 years old, doctors began experimenting on Chloe to “transition” her from being a girl to a boy.She should have been able to trust her doctors when she told them about her anxiety and gender dysphoria. Instead, these medical “professionals” coerced Chloe and her parents into irreversible life-altering “treatment.”**Doctors told her parents they could either have a “dead daughter or a living son.”** Then, doctors lied to Chloe.They lied when they told her that absent puberty blockers and surgeries her gender dysphoria would never resolve itself.

We know that the scientific data shows that often gender dysphoria does resolve itself by the time children reach adulthood.Doctors also lied, by omission, when they failed to inform Chloe of the many less invasive treatment options that should have been an option for her. Instead, for the next several years, these medical “professionals” pumped Chloe full of chemicals used on high-risk sex offenders to castrate them.Specifically, they gave her**Lupon Depot** to stop her natural progression into puberty, which is an off-label use of the drug.**Then, when Chloe was just 16 years old, doctors performed a double mastectomy on her.** And it’s time to hold them accountable.My name is Harmeet K. Dhillon, the founder of the Center for American Liberty (CAL). And I’m helping Chloe finally receive justice.So, with your support, we’re suing the hospital and doctors that did this to Chloe.Chloe deserves justice. She finds herself just 18 years old wondering if she will ever be able to have children and knowing that if she is able to have children, she will never be able to breast feed them.Doctors robbed Chloe of her experience as a woman—and they did it through deceptive and coercive tactics. This legal battle won’t be easily won – we’re facing Kaiser Permanente Hospital, who has billions of dollars at their disposal. In fact, just last year Kaiser Permanente reported **$8 billion** profit in 2021 alone. [**So, if you’re in the position to make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to the Center of American Liberty today to help us win a historic victory against predatory doctors and hospitals butchering children for profit, I hope you will.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zksn2lsao68ef7aabv3hp1e2d5hea5hdje38k18o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3hm1o36c9h2bs) These hospitals, transgender activists, and medical “professionals” have a lot to lose in this case so we know they will put up a huge fight—likely hiring some of the most expensive lawyers in the country to protect their interests.But Americans like you and I simply can't stand for this. You and I must make sure that no child ever goes through what Chloe Cole did. Chloe is courageously standing up for herself and for vulnerable kids everywhere.Will you stand with her?Thank you for supporting our mission today.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgoaa42s7r08e6k9e1nuck25mpeh27kbldscmlho_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3hm1o36c9h2bs)
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl5l834nh8nbr1pqo8fn4t6eiuo8dq966a0qojl8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3hm1o36c9h2bs)
---
| | P.S. If we don’t fight back now and hold these medical “professionals” accountable, untold thousands of young children could suffer the same horrible fate as Chloe. We can’t allow that. [**So please, join the fight to help us get justice for Chloe and save the future of our children with a tax-deductible gift of $35 more today.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z70r6af09qb4j0rq1cntu63vsgitae1sc2bbh0hg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3hm1o36c9h2bs)
---

name: Add Your Name (Left Action)
subject: Kick Marjorie Taylor Greene out of Congress for threatening an armed attack
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
## [Kick Marjorie Taylor Greene out of Congress for threatening an armed attack](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3e6d8372-6c85-4d44-a694-b3d5c4b4efc0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf4288007-17a7-4b35-8621-2d0d022b853f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | _(Already took this action? Forward this email to friends so we can make as big an impact as possible! Want to unsubscribe? See link at bottom)_ Speaking at a right-wing gala, and referring to the January 6th attack on the Capitol, Representative Marjorie Taylor Greene had this to say:

**" I will tell you something, if Steve Bannon and I organized that, we would have won. Not to mention, it would've been armed." **([Story](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3a2897e4-c52b-4ace-b607-151128eea283/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9))

Let's unpack this: Greene endorsed an armed attack on the very government body that she is a part of -- and said she would lead it. And she has a long history of this kind of thing. **She is a clear and present danger to those around her, and she should be expelled from Congress immediately.**

[**Add your name, and demand that Greene be kicked out of Congress NOW.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdbb6285f-80e5-4c02-aa63-0382f6e619e7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: American Action News
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv9lqv1gjo98gf29p9mivch35944q9qavmmf8re8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3hm6oj0clh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbukr9d5q1fd5422fb84o0mk5g7keo8lb5g74g10_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3hm6oj0clh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z65eq6c9pjefahk387opi6r6814al33cnm24pmpo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3hm6oj0clh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2bl17dc80v7rtol7o679em7mjicvndm4eqq7od8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3hm6oj0clh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Response Requested (via DLCC.org)
subject: How did you feel about state Democrats’ performance in the midterm elections?
body:
With so many races across the country, it can be tough to get an accurate picture of how voters in states like yours feel about the midterm elections. | | |
---
| | **State Democrats had a historic showing in this year’s midterm election! We notched victories in key battleground states like Michigan, Maine, Minnesota, and Pennsylvania.** But with so many races across the country, it can be tough to get an accurate picture of how voters in states like yours feel about the midterm elections. **[_How did you feel about Democrats’ performance in the midterm elections? name: Joe Shepherd, President of United Rural Democrats
subject: Headlines about Rural America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United Rural Democrats](https://click
body:
Everyone has an opinion on rural voters. | | | Hi Peter – Everyone has an opinion on rural voters. This past election, we heard political pundits and pollsters break down our voting habits and how each party views our base. Here are just a few of the most recent things I've heard said about rural voters:
* [**CNN**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDHIu1NBBIavvd-KnnPu1Ji0pY-vRd1kGAkC927AbX-WnQ9aB2Vqp7L_OiPW08Xrbj776PiDUPuBKONwgxdTjqFfDf38yzxtI2LoPlStxTd5NbEEv-LnAr9Y1Y0W0sbePTOvf3Ni3y8Uuibu3BDsPNdP_t79tqrcIYwKXO9YCrLHCHZcVk224ggopswKuNb1jGE1m8XVUqJlmaeUznqtcZkU7Ct3FEIMTNeTdMlZQtBmYJbXPuoZa7Kb4DD2zVKbJuQDaC3CUECD2ivBj3d6A0s8bRQxWzX28xi_wzhFYIQFxdB-lHDTACAqBqsL8sVAIQ_Uu26nZLjiteKP5_HLmWZI/3rx/Ql32pv13Ru6AXpxxwy_fIQ/h0/-0Zb8NIeS3Bys1J2tj1LUXl4h5LeEft-rQQ3Okvr6DA): "[In 2022], an already-strong Republican lead among rural voters got even bigger"
* [**The Hill**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhpwmY_DHMAZqFSLUrpAn-pofZ1DMaVY5zJP8yhlfGxALuAI2VRboicBVgRk1I4jzB-fGTFqCJLJ34mOi5U5cfW-eW-mU0IEDKlnGaHHt9bz-8ZBky_sBLtDZDNmgHG16ayH_ElQfgSfWhpVRlRq-AZUUJW23_euQYZ1w8sv-Bn1xh-v5-6hWdOzarYM7g3wyTfZ6MY4WBx0R87ndGxKEn5W1Jqbo3exD3My6ZjOuu0SKm7fFk3nu-R7y0Cn-JGR4muJOOt7WjdnxjU_4Yy-jOkFb1UWnL_QMQ8m0diSFUAfNbrc34IYLL5-5YXPkw7FzbPLxpaYK9T8Ok7iDJXJRa7fOWS-nkXecihW4qXgBP28C/3rx/Ql32pv13Ru6AXpxxwy_fIQ/h1/xmhC4k9YibIKQDn2GHkizXYe9qJFBJ8alK1abmRyYXg): Liberals say rural voters could swing tight elections — and that Democrats have been ignoring that fact at their peril.
* Democratic Strategist David Yankovich: “In rural communities, smaller communities, people don’t want you to just parachute in in August or September of an election year."
* [**NPR**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDGGfxAsuO6d0fvOFu5n02Iw8-wDTuDMTUYUKLlR9pIoIOLFVNSGuIFVB3bNP6wBwlFv8gSVBOILD8FLHFTpz0srkbjfn_GVrjYJPN7rwrkXMTvf-p-pngOXAiYna9zdJzcY21oArC6Ds3Dj7u3E3uJAVGbYlzOtK5fwFbk8e5s-SYWssTgu3iqtKcyWEI1BiH3h-717Ol_7t7xcj-14v2qAFrdtCvazRqnEQWHp16JPn2wJ81YIxva-XiUBcOOFlxGLZpb92iJ9TDRPrXQk6RIBDtuG-wTZ4K1l10Pf_3pciSZ4dyh8Nf8FLahQMINskyoYDl0oCPKRWHLsYBcmfLsjjwBkMBO_Hb_T0hLAuEBQz/3rx/Ql32pv13Ru6AXpxxwy_fIQ/h2/cpyWw3wMdWzXtSpklf4IPFQTyodvfqUACU2C1EgM-Cg): "Democrats have failed in modern times to motivate the rural voting base."
* [**The American Prospect**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/1XQbiUZqIgkFRQxQopJGKRZY3No38ORkp5aRrFmp10aTe-vC1UwZVUd3o9QQruuCwzMot-WMssvUKinYV24YbVtPxQGJzD9LSW0nSNAQPJd8AcUSz6rPb8-Bz1nx4fmN2Ayc4PEf1ENrf7AYZBcGKp4WmO4kMNYyxyr6Peih3nLI2Xwl4y-wH5hndtCcB6cXEKhBsR1k4rAU4ruLGKK1Cr8vVohuFwwlRQgg7cVScoa1k6RUDcIRLLbP406FpwLN-EN5D2-QLJfbfJVB49GE-NsjX5AeD0M_ljBt1QgFjXQt_E0IEnc-i9v8jDa9sdJe/3rx/Ql32pv13Ru6AXpxxwy_fIQ/h3/TRE9V2W4Cz9JjoK_bdPYx70ddbOI0fg6BmF2Ah8eRRU): "If [Democrats] could perform even 5 percent better in rural counties, the political landscape would be transformed."

These are just _some_ of the most recent news headlines and quotes about rural Democrats, and many people are saying similar things. **Democrats have historically failed to prioritize rural voters. That needs to change.** We also heard that if Democrats were to make gains in rural areas, they could win races - even in Republican-controlled areas. While there may be a lot of criticism about Democrats failing to reach out to rural voters, we have succeeded in improving Democratic results in many communities, and we won races in 2022 because of it. **[The real challenge now is to keep up that momentum and expand upon it. Will you help us further that goal and reach more rural voters, Peter?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2GcgLcLAiJxM41wNRSPToQ-PTiGhaj8EawttTQCFL0FmrBXYFRVWgwiDF0fRIlAVGS2Y-01EHKsTcOWnudw_2NsSSYK8PmpdP_nMVJuJtBl1fZw0WGNDVRE5IrKsjo3b0PFtGaML56YP1Dg5C8-7I8tFnKa_OpHS-IsaZEyU79-F1gEhs3KeABdy5GhT5Eb0umtgzbx_qIvB9fgUk_S1e5QWdqdF-7RFR9V_JgXeIjlxG3iHppqp0wz9DVI0-V-qeSwPnDxVoJM6oG8hvzKxNDT1CCD791Y3O4O8xmsAyJZ9Wsx3LY3aB2e4o2C6fyiqIB8FuFKgGqEH93cJ99fu7J5Ew/3rx/Ql32pv13Ru6AXpxxwy_fIQ/h4/HTBJ-W5-YT0sX5tdH_3w5QsdYtj-HUJ_tHiQh-h5LVA)** **[CHIP IN HERE****](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2GcgLcLAiJxM41wNRSPToQ-PTiGhaj8EawttTQCFL0FmrCeJ9JCphogWpaEzSAEceIl1Ws7C_uPEB1j2QkiaJ_E--LZMm0yVFvAZXdAecY3djvi2eZxSk7ndZmBkB6TT7qk9UToh0Ibrmxmfvj5c-1-VX8QmnwWV9AZmewd1ba6IY2_6ouZcWvlgvLdB3oV1SXjXqFzcfVK0jBfaL3AVKJbsi5d9iiEt8c_pzhfB_n1-XROReSbnylV7vbW6GirShLtvD4Ge2tdBChgZcKKRTIekf1o7HTMCBdg-WPXpfZOSzxuPsMZszTOdTHYDLMgPCOo2qFbhKtQS7NxZevq8tJBMg/3rx/Ql32pv13Ru6AXpxxwy_fIQ/h5/4t88VmrT7V4GtOeiZ_AAkUPlUE_C1FdyHVlPBQ7z8eg)** Thank you for supporting Democrats and URD. – Joe Shepherd, President of United Rural Democrats

body:
First and foremost, we want to thank you.
#
Derek -
First and foremost, we want to thank you.
Thanks to supporters like you, we were able to run some of the most effective ads that helped save the Senate and keep the House close for Democrats.
**Look at these small-dollar donor stats for 2022:**
**Donations:** 286,692
**Raised:** $7,918,205
**Average donation:** $27.62
Again, we spent more than $23 million for the cycle and a HUGE part of that came in response to emails like this.
Now we have to get ready for the next cycle. We have to retake the House, hold the Senate, AND we have a presidential campaign.
So we’re running a year-end fundraising drive to start replenishing what we spent last cycle. Please.
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to VoteVets before our year-end fundraising drive comes to an end? We would not ask if these donations were not so important to our work.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec22.pX32s6&refcode=em221212-1-15&t=1&akid=7230%2E3013755%2EmeMkU0)

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: End child mutilation now
body:
| |
---
| | Peter, Imagine a world where a doctor decides to amputate your child's leg to cure appendicitis. _Ridiculous, dangerous, and irresponsible_... right? Now... imagine a world where that doctor is praised for his or her "bravery" and for giving your child the body he or she was "always meant to have." I paint a disturbing picture. But this is happening under our noses. **Except it's not amputations for appendicitis -- it's double mastectomies, chemical castration drugs, and genitalia mutilation surgeries for children with gender dysphoria.** The Center for American Liberty is now actively engaged in legal action against Kaiser Permanente Hospital for physically mutilating and destroying the health of an innocent girl, Chloe Cole, after convincing her that she needed to be a boy to survive. **I need your help to fund this legal battle.** [**Will you donate an urgent tax-deductible gift today to the Center for American Liberty to help cover our lawyer fees, months of research, and expert witness costs?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62063987:Jr9XVVGjN:m:1:3253819041:E94B2E0F8143D557D7AADC36EE43BE70:r) Before you decide to donate today, let me briefly share with you the details on this case. When Chloe Cole was 13 years old, doctors began experimenting on Chloe to "transition" her from being a girl to a boy. She should have been able to trust her doctors when she told them about her anxiety and gender dysphoria. Instead, these medical "professionals" coerced Chloe and her parents into irreversible life-altering "treatment." **Doctors told her parents they could either have a "dead daughter or a living son."** Then, doctors lied to Chloe. They lied when they told her that absent puberty blockers and surgeries her gender dysphoria would never resolve itself.

We know that the scientific data shows that often gender dysphoria does resolve itself by the time children reach adulthood. Doctors also lied, by omission, when they failed to inform Chloe of the many less invasive treatment options that should have been an option for her. Instead, for the next several years, these medical "professionals" pumped Chloe full of chemicals used on high-risk sex offenders to castrate them. Specifically, they gave her**Lupon Depot** to stop her natural progression into puberty, which is an off-label use of the drug. **Then, when Chloe was just 16 years old, doctors performed a double mastectomy on her.** And it's time to hold them accountable. My name is Harmeet K. Dhillon, the founder of the Center for American Liberty (CAL). And I'm helping Chloe finally receive justice. So, with your support, we're suing the hospital and doctors that did this to Chloe. Chloe deserves justice. She finds herself just 18 years old wondering if she will ever be able to have children and knowing that if she is able to have children, she will never be able to breast feed them. Doctors robbed Chloe of her experience as a woman, and they did it through deceptive and coercive tactics. This legal battle won't be easily won, we're facing Kaiser Permanente Hospital, who has billions of dollars at their disposal. In fact, just last year Kaiser Permanente reported **$8 billion** profit in 2021 alone. [**So, if you're in the position to make a generous, tax-deductible donation of to the Center of American Liberty today to help us win a historic victory against predatory doctors and hospitals butchering children for profit, I hope you will.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62063987:Jr9XVVGjN:m:1:3253819041:E94B2E0F8143D557D7AADC36EE43BE70:r) These hospitals, transgender activists, and medical "professionals" have a lot to lose in this case so we know they will put up a huge fight, likely hiring some of the most expensive lawyers in the country to protect their interests. But Americans like you and I simply can't stand for this. You and I must make sure that no child ever goes through what Chloe Cole did. Chloe is courageously standing up for herself and for vulnerable kids everywhere. Will you stand with her? Thank you for supporting our mission today.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62063987:Jr9XVVGjN:m:1:3253819041:E94B2E0F8143D557D7AADC36EE43BE70:r)

| | P.S. If we don't fight back now and hold these medical "professionals" accountable, untold thousands of young children could suffer the same horrible fate as Chloe. We can't allow that. [**So please, join the fight to help us get justice for Chloe and save the future of our children with a tax-deductible gift today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62063987:Jr9XVVGjN:m:1:3253819041:E94B2E0F8143D557D7AADC36EE43BE70:r)

When Chloe Cole was 13 years old, doctors began experimenting on Chloe to "transition" her from being a girl to a boy. She should have been able to trust her doctors when she told them about her anxiety and gender dysphoria. Instead, these medical "professionals" coerced Chloe and her parents into irreversible life-altering "treatment." Doctors told her parents they could either have a "dead daughter or a living son." Then, doctors lied to Chloe. They lied when they told her that absent puberty blockers and surgeries her gender dysphoria would never resolve itself. We know that the scientific data shows that often gender dysphoria does resolve itself by the time children reach adulthood. Doctors also lied, by omission, when they failed to inform Chloe of the many less invasive treatment options that should have been an option for her. Instead, for the next several years, these medical "professionals" pumped Chloe full of chemicals used on high-risk sex offenders to castrate them. Specifically, they gave herLupon Depot to stop her natural progression into puberty, which is an off-label use of the drug. Then, when Chloe was just 16 years old, doctors performed a double mastectomy on her. And it's time to hold them accountable. My name is Harmeet K. Dhillon, the founder of the Center for American Liberty (CAL). And I'm helping Chloe finally receive justice. So, with your support, we're suing the hospital and doctors that did this to Chloe. Chloe deserves justice. She finds herself just 18 years old wondering if she will ever be able to have children and knowing that if she is able to have children, she will never be able to breast feed them. Doctors robbed Chloe of her experience as a woman, and they did it through deceptive and coercive tactics. This legal battle won't be easily won, we're facing Kaiser Permanente Hospital, who has billions of dollars at their disposal. In fact, just last year Kaiser Permanente reported $8 billion profit in 2021 alone. These hospitals, transgender activists, and medical "professionals" have a lot to lose in this case so we know they will put up a huge fight, likely hiring some of the most expensive lawyers in the country to protect their interests. But Americans like you and I simply can't stand for this. You and I must make sure that no child ever goes through what Chloe Cole did. Chloe is courageously standing up for herself and for vulnerable kids everywhere. Will you stand with her? Thank you for supporting our mission today. Sincerely, | | | | | P.S. If we don't fight back now and hold these medical "professionals" accountable, untold thousands of young children could suffer the same horrible fate as Chloe. We can't allow that. | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. (C) The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177 This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 29, 2021. For more information . | mailto:unsub-52323833877-echo7-0A97343A2AFB1515411F87FB9D77A81F@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7503%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=1hMMmhxarZYwjTXLfHa1iw&sysid=1)
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96358%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mPQk6QMYqM6rRhw%2b5wqZKw&sysid=1)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation’s mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96359%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=djcOEX59tBxfhjap%2fLbvsQ&sysid=1)

**_Now I’ll share my story_ ... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how “helpless” I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We’re taught to believe we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I’ve dealt with racism... _**I’ve even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96350%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=84hf3CAgX39z28wSm7rqAQ&sysid=1)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I’m not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don’t want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a “think tank”, but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting “DO-tank”. We’re doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation’s values, what we’re doing to reach Black communities, and what we’re fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly “fighting for minorities” are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT’s efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96351%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FUdEvQjKllI7RKYPwkZmAw&sysid=1)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96352%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=h0wBWjmEOin5BKQF8csxGQ&sysid=1)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we’re actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96353%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5%2fwWat98mNnkZE4F12YHsw&sysid=1)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96354%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=N%2fsivid2njevfej2IFxNtw&sysid=1)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we’ve allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We’re hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We’re not just preaching to the choir, and these aren’t boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT’s events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96365%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8edoVvx87xB9q5OAcF%2fDMw&sysid=1)

What does “BLEXIT” mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96366%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CPQSIHvwiI3F4aQBk10DbA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96367%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hKYF1oGNtQd3VN4RL7eItA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96368%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dvOcfQNsccFqoLDQ8M08Tg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96369%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YV%2fZtwq4oi9vrKpsnYDmSQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96360%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uYT%2fxt6gkHP%2fgNTVylrfgg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96361%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1PvrQrOSo5KtzeGkO89XtQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96362%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0OPr1ZyGmNc0TkuzepM19Q&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96363%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=o5UTO5g%2bMbYHpyxS56OSvA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96364%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AhWUoD7rmT9ypbC%2fp%2fQLUw&sysid=1)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c96375%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7mUgsBMWoXqHSQpo0NxJ%2bQ&sysid=1)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7503%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=1hMMmhxarZYwjTXLfHa1iw&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7503%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=1hMMmhxarZYwjTXLfHa1iw&sysid=1)

In contrast, **Kevin McCarthy has been a disappointing leader for the GOP.** He’s been willing to compromise on key conservative issues, and has even worked with the Democrats on legislation that runs counter to our principles.

**It's time for a change. It's time for a leader who will stand up for conservative principles and defend the Constitution.**

Let's show Kevin McCarthy and the rest of the GOP establishment that we are not going to settle for weak and ineffective leadership any longer.

subject: D.C. jail blocked cancer treatment for Jan. 6 peaceful protester
body:

Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it grew aggressively into stage 3 cancer over eight months, because the D.C. jail doctors REFUSED to let him take his medications...and REFUSED to let him see an oncologist! | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqpihv5uuqdg1mp600ptokv3o5c5ut0f9u2oqt10_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3hm1o36c1h2bs)

| | |

| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z949k9ovl49jif2v1ktk0rv4av28gmbubto1g6u8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3hm1o36c1h2bs) Hi Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr3sa1ldfr04jftgg6bkrkr169sisr197t3l802o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3hm1o36c1h2bs)

Peaceful Protester Christopher Worrell committed no crimes on January 6th. He simply exercised his First Amendment right to free speech, along with thousands of other patriots outside the Capitol building.

But he was arrested anyway and thrown into the infamous D.C. jail that’s torturing and abusing patriots as I write you this urgent email.

**Christopher was jailed with stage 1 cancer, a non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma. Prescription medication kept it in remission. But it grew aggressively into stage 3 cancer over eight months, because the D.C. jail doctors REFUSED to let him take his medications...and REFUSED to let him see an oncologist!**

The abuse Christopher endured was so bad, that a federal judge finally ordered him to be released from jail based on an investigation by the U.S. Marshals.

Christopher is back home now, but he’s been in and out of the hospital. He’s in very bad shape, even after five rounds of chemotherapy.

Christopher’s fiancée, Trish, went public about the outrageous violation of his human rights on Tucker Carlson’s show recently.

**And when Tucker asked her if any politicians were coming to their aid, Trish said, “They’re ignoring us.”**

So, the D.C. jail is torturing and abusing peaceful protesters...blocking lifesaving medical care...and no one on Capitol Hill is helping them!

**If the Department of Justice and the D.C. jail can persecute and destroy the health of a peaceful protester for simply speaking up outside the Capitol building on January 6th, they can push you and me, our families, friends, and fellow Americans around, too.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf5v0uqj6c2sg5ttpvd0sh4ssocbtatlei2hiek0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3hm1o36c1h2bs)

**I’m fighting for the January 6 Peaceful Protesters, while so many others are just talking.**

[**So please give what you can right away.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqu66832r7t02sun49oievl9c0cs5ga3iko884jg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3hm1o36c1h2bs)

Thank you!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, what the Biden Department of Justice, aka Biden “Gestapo,” and the D.C. jail “gulag” did to Christopher Worrell is pure evil.** He’s an innocent American who simply spoke up for our threatened freedoms outside of the Capitol building on January 6th.

[**Please dig deep and give a vital $25, $50, $100 or more right away to help fuel all of my critically important fights on behalf of the January 6 peaceful protesters.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdk9mkkn5tnjasvp18o0kjsn78fiaakaftot7cl8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3hm1o36c1h2bs)

name: Pro Life Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5unj4f3jst0bhpsrk2gkcrth4h84sv9db44sru8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3hm9o76c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zd7r6g3h3ijtgh0udj3iog329frggjer8m4eouu8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3hm9o76c9h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znd01nk9p5u3veaqcf3o3fgknhunda21rbn902dg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3hm9o76c9h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Unlock the Federalist Papers
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z7sajlutnqh8l2o86gdntpgnddopkksqcjt78kug_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3hm9o76c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3m54d3663pau5s3dai548ioq88thr4282iao8lg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3hm9o76c5h2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z77uvo37jdsepp9m9k7ermce5biph4kmcie84qq8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3hm9o76c5h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Candidate Spotlight: Winning in Texas
body:
| | |
---
Friend,
---
I went down to Texas many times this past cycle to campaign for some outstanding conservative candidates. I want to highlight a few of the great Texans who won their races in November.
---
| | **Gov. Greg Abbott** Since 2015, Gov. Greg Abbott has proudly served Texas as governor, advocating for parents, protecting our law enforcement, and fighting to secure our border.

---
|
---
| | Gov. Abbott has to deal with the fallout from Biden’s border crisis every day. Whether it’s confronting the historic surge of migrants crossing our southern border or working to stop the deluge of fentanyl, Gov. Abbott has been working tirelessly to keep America safe. Texans proudly reelected Gov. Abbott because he is a courageous leader who will always defend their freedom.
---
| |
---
| **Monica De La Cruz: TX-15** During one of my stops in Texas, I campaigned alongside Monica De La Cruz to make sure I did everything in my power to help her win. Monica De La Cruz worked nonstop to pull off an incredible victory. Now, for the first time in history, a Republican will represent Texas’ 15th Congressional District.
---
| | She’s a strong, powerful leader ready to get to work for the people of Texas. Her race was one of the most competitive congressional races in Texas, and I couldn’t be more proud to see her win. **Tony Gonzales: TX-23** With 20 years of military service under his belt, Tony Gonzales is no stranger to defending America. And as a congressman from Texas’ 23rd District, defending his district is personal. Tony has 800 miles of the U.S.-Mexico border in his district, and he’s working to defend every inch of it. I was proud to endorse him and thrilled to see him win reelection. **Wesley Hunt: TX-38 **When I endorsed and campaigned with Wesley Hunt last year, I saw firsthand that he’s a courageous leader who’ll make TX-38 proud. As an Army combat veteran, Wesley Hunt understands the value of freedom and the sacrifice necessary to protect it. He deployed to Iraq once and Saudi Arabia twice, and completed 55 air missions as a helicopter pilot. He’ll be a strong, conservative leader in Congress who will stand up to liberals, work to fix our economy, secure our border, and rein in out-of-control inflation.
---
| | **Morgan Luttrell: TX-08** Morgan Luttrell is a father, Navy SEAL, and a former Special Advisor at the Department of Energy. Now, he’s the congressman-elect for TX-08. Morgan is a tough leader who will stand for education, defend our American values, and work to secure our border. I am proud to have endorsed Morgan Luttrell and know he will do a fantastic job in Congress.** **
---
|
---
| | **Beth Van Duyne: TX-24 **Beth Van Duyne put herself through college, became mayor of her hometown, and joined the Trump administration as a regional administrator at the U.S. Department of Housing and Urban Development. She meets challenges head-on and will never back down in a fight for what’s right.
She was first elected in 2020 and quickly made a name for herself as an outspoken conservative. I’m excited to see everything she’s accomplished so far and know she’ll continue to represent the people of TX-24 well. Thanks to people like you, these incredible leaders won their races and will continue the important work of defending America at home and abroad. My very best,

---
| |
---
Nikki Haley
---
|
---
[](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=e5d5f1bb5593471d97f6e87587693d53&_e=DxUUh3Ef101Gmf6cdo5oKKTGe8otYvwybwb_Mh24fv420yjyb3cLoWGoMsvn-wDzEnQ6UL1np1VjD6GjNuR_yc7jIlhr2_Bjr5Opk615nvN1TFwctPu7MUdJqq7E7p_mP4UogO_kLtcuW6gcBarlXB2Ur_sncLD60Jriltyopi8s2GqZImLudPwlmVOj3e_784sxMvR7hLJRCYRgrnp6NZ6zLldaUP-Ic6qYWDYmAHQkc6CkGsxCfSTmfqzKoTGbV8gv7P7eDsLXMTHgQ53cftu2kukx6oGHoV55yzRNkPbj0XX8ngn7FsaBVtV49yzDvQZBXywMCFFkcOFn6oOiU0roRZEr_aKAuBjXQUt5_32xJSBDLAQnUBULpbVdJ0Bq8NWcuvvyoJfhCD2erlYLMQ%3D%3D)
---
** _Special Message from Nikki Haley:_** I’ve been fighting every day to support leaders who believe America is inherently good and who understand that Democrats’ far-left policies undermine our freedoms.
