clean_body: | | | Friend, I went down to Texas many times this past cycle to campaign for some outstanding conservative candidates. I want to highlight a few of the great Texans who won their races in November. | | Gov. Greg Abbott Since 2015, Gov. Greg Abbott has proudly served Texas as governor, advocating for parents, protecting our law enforcement, and fighting to secure our border. | | | Gov. Abbott has to deal with the fallout from Biden’s border crisis every day. Whether it’s confronting the historic surge of migrants crossing our southern border or working to stop the deluge of fentanyl, Gov. Abbott has been working tirelessly to keep America safe. Texans proudly reelected Gov. Abbott because he is a courageous leader who will always defend their freedom. | | | Monica De La Cruz: TX-15 During one of my stops in Texas, I campaigned alongside Monica De La Cruz to make sure I did everything in my power to help her win. Monica De La Cruz worked nonstop to pull off an incredible victory. Now, for the first time in history, a Republican will represent Texas’ 15th Congressional District. | | She’s a strong, powerful leader ready to get to work for the people of Texas. Her race was one of the most competitive congressional races in Texas, and I couldn’t be more proud to see her win. Tony Gonzales: TX-23 With 20 years of military service under his belt, Tony Gonzales is no stranger to defending America. And as a congressman from Texas’ 23rd District, defending his district is personal. Tony has 800 miles of the U.S.-Mexico border in his district, and he’s working to defend every inch of it. I was proud to endorse him and thrilled to see him win reelection. Wesley Hunt: TX-38 When I endorsed and campaigned with Wesley Hunt last year, I saw firsthand that he’s a courageous leader who’ll make TX-38 proud. As an Army combat veteran, Wesley Hunt understands the value of freedom and the sacrifice necessary to protect it. He deployed to Iraq once and Saudi Arabia twice, and completed 55 air missions as a helicopter pilot. He’ll be a strong, conservative leader in Congress who will stand up to liberals, work to fix our economy, secure our border, and rein in out-of-control inflation. | | Morgan Luttrell: TX-08 Morgan Luttrell is a father, Navy SEAL, and a former Special Advisor at the Department of Energy. Now, he’s the congressman-elect for TX-08. Morgan is a tough leader who will stand for education, defend our American values, and work to secure our border. I am proud to have endorsed Morgan Luttrell and know he will do a fantastic job in Congress. | | | Beth Van Duyne: TX-24 Beth Van Duyne put herself through college, became mayor of her hometown, and joined the Trump administration as a regional administrator at the U.S. Department of Housing and Urban Development. She meets challenges head-on and will never back down in a fight for what’s right. She was first elected in 2020 and quickly made a name for herself as an outspoken conservative. I’m excited to see everything she’s accomplished so far and know she’ll continue to represent the people of TX-24 well. Thanks to people like you, these incredible leaders won their races and will continue the important work of defending America at home and abroad. My very best, | | Nikki Haley | Special Message from Nikki Haley: I’ve been fighting every day to support leaders who believe America is inherently good and who understand that Democrats’ far-left policies undermine our freedoms. This work is far from over. | | Copyright © 2022 Stand For America PAC, All rights reserved. www.standforamericapac.com Contributions are not tax-deductible. name: Trump News HQ
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlqaooitq171633i27490gnegn2lff2fpsdjsccg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3hm9o76c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7vpsg85ucup0c2nqnipgb0trbcq9qhjm952a7a0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3hm9o76c9h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z74hah4tn6tdk2k1usu1cpj9l181l6sorecfqhm0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3hm9o76c9h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2810m45ipkvajcjc5vmejqbfvc2av6vqia52ki0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3hm9o76c9h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin | | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century. That's why we produced "" which you can now own on DVD. | | | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including: good and evil, conversion and faith, prayer and the Bible, suffering and death, * heaven and hell, and much more. Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis and After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity. That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with . Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:

**Thank you** for doing what's right and voting unanimously to subpoena Donald Trump.

_**You make me proud to be an American.**_

I'm so proud that we have leaders like YOU who are working to give the American people the truth about the attack on our Democracy.

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Americans find this “British Bulldog” captivating
body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD. This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=26020ba20b954fbd9488d6b67f50d4be&_e=iKjwJLFGVG6yZStMrkDIcXawSwTfhk8Xv-b3v5Zlu0mXzgwqzvIndkPqR3ag6gWdJeNVj8TuXzIj0gsoO3jPnVS337J-CPqmyK91p1xF7kOblzpvwsVFZ_klRNQzKWD2Bb8Txi99MtcP3fsZsGYAL_GT6VcBt7keQAG1s1cgaxTuB_qTvlh8KdPGxog8-UdGbwotXdReRp58IXQ1gRH7TloknY97eJtjA2K5M5-4P4xPXrkt8Har507Ty3k9mCbUOFf1zOhuqH2ykLhWCIwvpeY8DV7lhvr43ajJv3t4nUzeXqGAKZNtLu7r5KRctVGvF2TNLRE06yQT2UniTlc56TqtDLM0bffGbUrUZ0ooMydmISfnXgQa_EzSzBzX-EF85ufKFzkAcZy1RTm4dCBD1w%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,”** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the “British Bulldog” captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many “academics” and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill’s accomplishments more important than ever. **For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set:** **_[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=26020ba20b954fbd9488d6b67f50d4be&_e=iKjwJLFGVG6yZStMrkDIcXawSwTfhk8Xv-b3v5Zlu0mXzgwqzvIndkPqR3ag6gWdJeNVj8TuXzIj0gsoO3jPnVS337J-CPqmyK91p1xF7kOblzpvwsVFZ_klRNQzKWD2Bb8Txi99MtcP3fsZsGYAL_GT6VcBt7keQAG1s1cgaxTuB_qTvlh8KdPGxog8-UdGbwotXdReRp58IXQ1gRH7TloknY97eJtjA2K5M5-4P4xPXrkt8Har507Ty3k9mCbUh9BrfwKefWE6EwPEDlQyL58mfIn63fys3Oh74I_CJGZkaMo26uxkTjt3tZNjXbTeXhXbHZLjd6cJYbUsm8jtgERISo0yH75EsD86VoAK5cnwY7gj9WH3R3pCXjclqmBfUU0e7qgi2-Q9oHZJt9fJRw%3D%3D)_** As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=26020ba20b954fbd9488d6b67f50d4be&_e=iKjwJLFGVG6yZStMrkDIcXawSwTfhk8Xv-b3v5Zlu0mXzgwqzvIndkPqR3ag6gWdJeNVj8TuXzIj0gsoO3jPnVS337J-CPqmyK91p1xF7kOblzpvwsVFZ_klRNQzKWD2Bb8Txi99MtcP3fsZsGYAL_GT6VcBt7keQAG1s1cgaxTuB_qTvlh8KdPGxog8-UdGbwotXdReRp58IXQ1gRH7TloknY97eJtjA2K5M5-4P4xPXrkt8Har507Ty3k9mCbUi1D15TjFj4C6gDIUvbpRvJQp7aaYwDtn2i8S71wcKupA7gygihuRyCDlT6bjgZF3_nE_GJ3tJfe9V37Wj8bAAdETo_9ramo_QCR_hR8KfQP7AaYHD26E7QoK-KVCvTV6uwnGCeNgy48fSAjdwpuMcQ%3D%3D) Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift—before they’re gone. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship** ” on DVD: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=26020ba20b954fbd9488d6b67f50d4be&_e=iKjwJLFGVG6yZStMrkDIcXawSwTfhk8Xv-b3v5Zlu0mXzgwqzvIndkPqR3ag6gWdJeNVj8TuXzIj0gsoO3jPnVS337J-CPqmyK91p1xF7kOblzpvwsVFZ_klRNQzKWD2Bb8Txi99MtcP3fsZsGYAL_GT6VcBt7keQAG1s1cgaxTuB_qTvlh8KdPGxog8-UdGbwotXdReRp58IXQ1gRH7TloknY97eJtjA2K5M5-4P4xPXrkt8Har507Ty3k9mCbUzcun9Y6yqZEv8eYD-P445vPT5qUuz7db57RVaFbHEcyuunL_MBvO86UZsHhMGfOXL9FtRw-mTFbqLdkZ8CwTY25zAr6WJZgdzcAuTjnsKAuujaasQqJjN--V8ER5QZqbgc73iTsXc7xcga937cSsqA%3D%3D)_ You’ll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill’s words and deeds.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College |
---

subject: A step toward stopping the next January 6

body:

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55884949/383124622/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MThlNDY0OS02NTdhLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hhrYdiqr1u2dUUBdAxUQk1hnkvlhgtBNWjinKSJVFKA=&emci=4f4d17da-5f7a-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=818e4649-657a-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, **Our democracy is too important to allow the events of January 6, 2021 to happen ever again.** I have been working with my colleagues — both Democrats and fair-minded Republicans — to introduce stronger protections for our democratic systems and secure our elections. The result? Our bipartisan Electoral Count Reform Act, which would help prevent dangerous attempts from a few fringe members of Congress or a defeated President to overturn the results of an election. Before the pro-Trump mob besieged the Capitol, far-right members of Congress and President Trump himself were hard at work attempting to exploit outdated electoral provisions to block the certification of results and ultimately reverse the will of the people who elected President Biden. None of us can rest easy knowing that another bad actor could follow this playbook and actually succeed. The United States must remain a beacon of democracy in the world — and that starts here at home by modernizing our approach and ensuring each state’s popular vote is counted. ****[_Derek, I’m asking you to stand with me in support of this legislation to protect our election results. Will you sign your name to my petition now?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55884950/383124623/206561941?refcode=mw_em_221212_1&ms=mw_em_221212_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MThlNDY0OS02NTdhLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hhrYdiqr1u2dUUBdAxUQk1hnkvlhgtBNWjinKSJVFKA=&emci=4f4d17da-5f7a-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=818e4649-657a-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=4568237)**** As with any compromise, this legislation doesn’t go as far as we’d like and we still have more work to do. But passing this bill would be a big step toward stopping the next January 6 attack. Thank you, Mark ** ** ****[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55884951/383124624/206561941?refcode=mw_em_221212_1&ms=mw_em_221212_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MThlNDY0OS02NTdhLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hhrYdiqr1u2dUUBdAxUQk1hnkvlhgtBNWjinKSJVFKA=&emci=4f4d17da-5f7a-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=818e4649-657a-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=4568237)****

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. | | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=221f727a56ec4941b8cfcfcc73d6d530&_e=vF94ziPWg0105LOUUfrZrS5VnMEc0Njld9GFC_sJuxMYYbAjl_gl0Thy4PQuBjJlxoWRF6FJIhBr8xbPIB4g9NjI2t92E8tq4aLdUusGKoMiWx3il0v2NCk3rRvvD1DF-3PveXxvnbCZ1lxcFxogIYzoiVVro34YiO7rTOZYdYDigVE4ZHYr_U86wkc1yF9xqfzc-ZcwcX3sA2vSmflCTdm6f9kD3NldTRoEZ8qwMWMpDicXrkHHFz2zSrPhhQi-XlcIIF_0ZVWz74KtbKiXRlAOLu2_QFM0qDHNAXNlaK8QOa0eUW4PEiwgm5vkvPiTouUrX2Td6A7g4aCb30odZCLHdpLyDElaIf5NPxS2bzcE1qSEw-kbWFHUdtBg_eVrl8MZKna6fFpxroYzZXonFA%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight." By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." ** Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

clean_body: Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. | | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight." By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic " Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." Through "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry," you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life. | | Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group. You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. | | | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. body:

| I’ll be honest, Peter: we really beat the odds in the midterm elections. Even the most optimistic pundits called our race a TOSS-UP right up until Election Day – just check out what FiveThirtyEight was saying about our district hours before polls opened:
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55885949/383128795/-1389333690?refcode=BLU-SWC-20221212-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGZhYzEyOC02YTdhLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GTHuapQWH3c4no1AIMY4yUi2u2d9JZ2ZFGm9TBpMPGo=)
But even with the odds stacked against us, a self-funding millionaire opponent, and national Republicans spending big in their efforts to unseat me, **I defended my seat thanks to supporters like you.**

I wish I didn’t have to ask you for even a dollar of your hard-earned money so soon after Election Day. clean_body: Even with the odds stacked against us, I defended my seat thanks to supporters like you. | = | I’ll be honest, Peter: we really beat the odds in the midterm elections. Even the most optimistic pundits called our race a TOSS-UP right up until Election Day – just check out what FiveThirtyEight was saying about our district hours before polls opened: = But even with the odds stacked against us, a self-funding millionaire opponent, and national Republicans spending big in their efforts to unseat me, I defended my seat thanks to supporters like you. I wish I didn’t have to ask you for even a dollar of your hard-earned money so soon after Election Day. But after winning such a tight race, you can bet Republicans will be trying even harder to defeat me in 2024 – and that means we need to start building a strong foundation now. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Always grateful for your support, Susan | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. Peter, The reaction to Kyrsten Sinema quitting the Democratic Party has not been mixed. In fact, she’s been universally slammed.

[**Chip in now if you agree we need to replace Sinema in 2024 >>**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fcLOSVTxPm6saZ8tMjXlJXp0AhFffbS73H121eHeu73SUjWTzbfw1AT2gX7O3hMI4GUor-dgED6FKY5us-NsbQhVFfcf7vZ6nRYtuqyzwX8uzszEewBbixlkp1l0il7b1opL2fIE6N9q3gMx2SIU1Y4YT8Gj13EnM4B_vz-xjsUszv68E4YOovgZioNI-7IVGXwANwt05KUSQR9BLLuTOsFcX4Ciqfg0KQz7Ji2wzTlaGem0Zf2c2K3zKY0TSdqdFw/3rx/X6cXrE92RnuQ_QyAngGXnA/h0/m_gYYfn22l7zx271zF1PKmXEvIvDFmYZBfZqvGrKfZQ) Can’t say we’re surprised! Sinema calculated that she was going to lose a Democratic primary, so she decided to bypass it altogether. Her corporate donors and lobbyists are going to keep pouring more money than ever into her campaign account – because she does their bidding, not Arizona’s. name: Conservatives Give
subject: Americans find this “British Bulldog” captivating
body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD. This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9749769b14ba4d4a96d0a6f4bb0363f6&_e=lZ1Xt8GBuPSqkhfwPRxdA56HqsHusOuBwcAyHzqs_zH_1JpfN1iGU0QNAxKBaNvQ0eZEk6WnFndUv0DzOYQ_sD3Avt-RMPBJrYMgo8woPuYi7dFKZiy3Wxj-V5nYtag9cbWBjRtc-OSCfd3NitRuYhjX5NoU0u4ZivkG5Ji13NYFEAj_G_GD48YmthBMhLYAk5g1P6chcK20oXOMtp8LudzRBthQVMRpinNzg5hme0vDzcm3L_o7Rf-MKBJ12xZqQU3gRpq2fK3gEi8CgfpAXTLqVBVdcdTWZkt48aESsYyCtIERA6PrCZfAUeDkibPsFJ47mCKVL88bZM600929x-2qd-qzSwZiM3D7lm0wyDDgudknWniSGxoeusrm9qm7ax4Cn5pU8G6cBxoQj5Gjrg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College's most popular online courses, **" Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,"** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the "British Bulldog" captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many "academics" and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill's accomplishments more important than ever. **For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set:** **_[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9749769b14ba4d4a96d0a6f4bb0363f6&_e=lZ1Xt8GBuPSqkhfwPRxdA56HqsHusOuBwcAyHzqs_zH_1JpfN1iGU0QNAxKBaNvQ0eZEk6WnFndUv0DzOYQ_sD3Avt-RMPBJrYMgo8woPuYi7dFKZiy3Wxj-V5nYtag9cbWBjRtc-OSCfd3NitRuYhjX5NoU0u4ZivkG5Ji13NYFEAj_G_GD48YmthBMhLYAk5g1P6chcK20oXOMtp8LudzRBthQVMRpinNzg5hme0vDzcm3L_o7Rf-MKBJ12xZqfwyBQ_NNi6xXSSQJje01ThjLWWBSnGYLOGvKXxSymVhmkrp5BIUthknII4dzm5jSjgPHWoxWFVUKEaGmX1pVO9eDWa9kVKZd4MhAKotmNybbrrkNywr_ivHhi0g2uJH0e41045Lo0pNiIeLEAQ1mrA%3D%3D)_** As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9749769b14ba4d4a96d0a6f4bb0363f6&_e=lZ1Xt8GBuPSqkhfwPRxdA56HqsHusOuBwcAyHzqs_zH_1JpfN1iGU0QNAxKBaNvQ0eZEk6WnFndUv0DzOYQ_sD3Avt-RMPBJrYMgo8woPuYi7dFKZiy3Wxj-V5nYtag9cbWBjRtc-OSCfd3NitRuYhjX5NoU0u4ZivkG5Ji13NYFEAj_G_GD48YmthBMhLYAk5g1P6chcK20oXOMtp8LudzRBthQVMRpinNzg5hme0vDzcm3L_o7Rf-MKBJ12xZqUgejJHJdPsss9PkTtwiOqUUT9WOdTjjljh3DpYm1xKI4XWD1dKsJtQbpSJkpxN-2V4BftYt34wnTpZXqYlL4ePM3flt1eCu7mZNs8p-A_OyS6ysfnGgLHmrETuEcilMP5Uj0KdJurb2qbPxgijJXkg%3D%3D) Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you'll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift--before they're gone. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of **" Winston Churchill and Statesmanship**" on DVD: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9749769b14ba4d4a96d0a6f4bb0363f6&_e=lZ1Xt8GBuPSqkhfwPRxdA56HqsHusOuBwcAyHzqs_zH_1JpfN1iGU0QNAxKBaNvQ0eZEk6WnFndUv0DzOYQ_sD3Avt-RMPBJrYMgo8woPuYi7dFKZiy3Wxj-V5nYtag9cbWBjRtc-OSCfd3NitRuYhjX5NoU0u4ZivkG5Ji13NYFEAj_G_GD48YmthBMhLYAk5g1P6chcK20oXOMtp8LudzRBthQVMRpinNzg5hme0vDzcm3L_o7Rf-MKBJ12xZqMSQqtHGuunEuFNA2qISi0KKGIVo5M5gzhVEoQ3VWWi4rAV0jIoeAo2EwPzd5LXpacVtybZzscfmy6z1wtTKxSh_0mX_0b5kKE9xcVD0ikeaL0RE1JGry9DdgDi48FVNoUdhGSudGHThFnLah_ZJ7zg%3D%3D)_ You'll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill's words and deeds.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College |

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: re: Kevin McCarthy’s attacks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
McCarthy has promised to remove me from the Foreign Affairs Committee.
#
Peter, it’s Congresswoman Ilhan Omar here.
House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy — who is on track to be Speaker of the House next year — **announced that he plans to keep his promise to remove me from the Foreign Affairs Committee.**
Representative Jayapal and I have worked tirelessly to pass our progressive agenda and deliver lifesaving legislation for our communities, all in the face of the GOP’s relentless attacks.
[**I’m asking you to stand with us as McCarthy & the Republicans ramp up their hateful campaign against me. Will you rush a donation split between me and Rep. Jayapal right now?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25218?refcode=em20221212-1939&t=1&akid=1939%2E420207%2EDESsCv)
McCarthy and House Republicans will do _anything_ to distract from reality, which is that they only narrowly won back the House when historical trends were in their favor, _and_ they can’t offer any policies that would actually _help_ their constituents.
Instead of working to create a more equitable, just country, they are appealing to the most radical members of their base — promising to kick me and other Democrats off our committees, launch partisan investigations, gut popular and important policies like the _Affordable Care Act_ and the _Inflation Reduction Act_ , and cut even more taxes to benefit corporations and the ultra-wealthy at the expense of the working class.
That’s all compounded by the fact that McCarthy continues to enable his members’ hatred and corruption, including Islamophobic, sexist attacks against me and continued support for Donald Trump after he incited an attempted coup on the Capitol.
[**I refuse to let Republicans silence us or get in the way of our movement’s work for progress. There’s power in numbers, and Rep. Jayapal and I need support in this fight. Will you help us stand up to the GOP and grow our progressive bloc by rushing a split donation of $3 right now?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25218?refcode=em20221212-1939&t=2&akid=1939%2E420207%2EDESsCv)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25218?refcode=em20221212-1939&t=21&akid=1939%2E420207%2EDESsCv)**
Nothing terrifies Kevin McCarthy and his far-right allies in the House more than a Black, Muslim, progressive refugee who is relentless in the fight to build a more equitable, peaceful country and world.
House Republicans are hyper-focused on stopping our movement’s work — from moving the needle on progressive issues like Medicare for All and universal school meals, to passing transformative legislation like the _Inflation Reduction Act_ , to standing alongside union workers on the picket lines to demand better workplaces.
I won’t let their bad-faith attacks prevent me from following through with what I was re-elected to do — deliver bold, progressive change, no matter what. But they won’t let up without a fight. Rep. Jayapal and I are counting on you to stand with us while they try to tear our movement down.
[**They know you are our strongest asset — an unstoppable people-powered movement that will only continue to grow. You can make the difference for us in the face of their relentless attacks — will you rush a split $3 contribution right now?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/25218?refcode=em20221212-1939&t=22&akid=1939%2E420207%2EDESsCv)
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20221212-1939-footer&t=23&refcode2=1939_420207_DESsCv&akid=1939%2E420207%2EDESsCv)**
---

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

clean_body: McCarthy has promised to remove me from the Foreign Affairs Committee. Peter, it’s Congresswoman Ilhan Omar here. House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy — who is on track to be Speaker of the House next year — announced that he plans to keep his promise to remove me from the Foreign Affairs Committee. Representative Jayapal and I have worked tirelessly to pass our progressive agenda and deliver lifesaving legislation for our communities, all in the face of the GOP’s relentless attacks. McCarthy and House Republicans will do anything to distract from reality, which is that they only narrowly won back the House when historical trends were in their favor, and they can’t offer any policies that would actually help their constituents. Instead of working to create a more equitable, just country, they are appealing to the most radical members of their base — promising to kick me and other Democrats off our committees, launch partisan investigations, gut popular and important policies like the Affordable Care Act and the Inflation Reduction Act , and cut even more taxes to benefit corporations and the ultra-wealthy at the expense of the working class. That’s all compounded by the fact that McCarthy continues to enable his members’ hatred and corruption, including Islamophobic, sexist attacks against me and continued support for Donald Trump after he incited an attempted coup on the Capitol. Nothing terrifies Kevin McCarthy and his far-right allies in the House more than a Black, Muslim, progressive refugee who is relentless in the fight to build a more equitable, peaceful country and world. House Republicans are hyper-focused on stopping our movement’s work — from moving the needle on progressive issues like Medicare for All and universal school meals, to passing transformative legislation like the Inflation Reduction Act , to standing alongside union workers on the picket lines to demand better workplaces. I won’t let their bad-faith attacks prevent me from following through with what I was re-elected to do — deliver bold, progressive change, no matter what. But they won’t let up without a fight. Rep. Jayapal and I are counting on you to stand with us while they try to tear our movement down. In solidarity, Ilhan Omar | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The 2023 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional is here
body:
As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6m2uf5jfcl5mrbg7gcel1glp5dop9r740aoq9l0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3jmaoj1c9h2bs)
---
Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That’s why I’ve written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we’ll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* From January to February, we’ll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we’ll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we’ll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we’ll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---
[Request your 2023 Daily Devotional](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcdn45kkj7ftp3odkkhpp4uafois6u9kjq18fds0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3jmaoj1c9h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc60m77cdqi7n5qn9gpncrag3q6l92e7lkk17dag_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3jmaoj1c9h2bs)
---
| The _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day.
---
| | We’re offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ this month. **And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31.** To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/light-in-the-darkness-matching-challenge/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr7jo4gbcte6kbgdl0js7u2f70hnns7o5a3okiqo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3jmaoj1c9h2bs) What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? What do you think we would accomplish? I’m excited to find out. Thanks for your partnership with this ministry. Sharing the Truth of God’s Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Fighting for the lives of the unborn
body:
I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of h
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbcthhe55cfavkl9a84hnp17980qtr4v0qlcf6fo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3jmcob2c5h2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za3kcd2fse0to3af1jqitmo7uoltrqlkbjt5gsro_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3jmcob2c5h2bs) I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5pcbm1iodrfq4158effaph38giimn2r29tq2ir8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3jmcob2c5h2bs) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---

name: Full Mag News
subject: Unlock the Federalist Papers
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6c2fe9b298e24fb48e1df240acaff399&_e=RRnXQUwksCi2lZd_ASmlRNRyO3xRdz3I4ly1SoXvezcUU_e01YE7fO9AXENaV4JHWDTwyz91HLZDa5hzX730qex8JXq7jajYkMSY1ydvljgvYSnS4Rqiz9D5V3LRN5EPntQNGT3ZXJKuZB8Qm9q7zgLa3BWl0iy7hl6e0heZCcFEmoKiEfLI12OgKFkm_KAxcMMWQKX6yFYCQRMH0WubCBArH9X-gyDKeP2sJczjIt40KdUUZZUB8ulU42ig0ehiBVjSi36EE5uQhbV-SnWs_Yo-AWUab7CKzxrZ7a5u6uO3jxnhrmRfoVyoKMzSIGzpoyKLr88garkADnoyHqyKaj2sTaSY4Ia56Uf3ApAFfup4xs6Gbqlzk9r6Xh1QR3hVoBvBlF-mHRt4NqV3I4G8qA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation's history. They've shaken me, and I'm sure they've affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** --not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as "the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written." That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I 'd like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, "_The Federalist Papers_ ,"on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**" The Federalist Papers"**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It's taught by Hillsdale's knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation's founding principles of liberty. [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6c2fe9b298e24fb48e1df240acaff399&_e=RRnXQUwksCi2lZd_ASmlRNRyO3xRdz3I4ly1SoXvezcUU_e01YE7fO9AXENaV4JHWDTwyz91HLZDa5hzX730qex8JXq7jajYkMSY1ydvljgvYSnS4Rqiz9D5V3LRN5EPntQNGT3ZXJKuZB8Qm9q7zgLa3BWl0iy7hl6e0heZCcFEmoKiEfLI12OgKFkm_KAxcMMWQKX6yFYCQRMH0WubCBArH9X-gyDKeP2sJczjIt40KdUUZZUB8ulU42ig0ehiOBSI7udIvlmhDHT5Cf_MD3Y66nAlU15va8glMU9iarp_DQDRwgtY41HF68ZIwN9KBFIlTWHXACD6CE55w9MuEre3102Aon0_6fxl9s7bdylg8NcPqDkpQkDevr9PZqosQ2p1h0PvBm2kIGQjCgSCpw%3D%3D) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_" The Federalist Papers"_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won't last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**" The Federalist Papers"**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6c2fe9b298e24fb48e1df240acaff399&_e=RRnXQUwksCi2lZd_ASmlRNRyO3xRdz3I4ly1SoXvezcUU_e01YE7fO9AXENaV4JHWDTwyz91HLZDa5hzX730qex8JXq7jajYkMSY1ydvljgvYSnS4Rqiz9D5V3LRN5EPntQNGT3ZXJKuZB8Qm9q7zgLa3BWl0iy7hl6e0heZCcFEmoKiEfLI12OgKFkm_KAxcMMWQKX6yFYCQRMH0WubCBArH9X-gyDKeP2sJczjIt40KdUUZZUB8ulU42ig0ehiAy9vxY6wFu_WXJ66ZlLlOP2W7qY_dXseJ_CjNtyxMnFjFT4I5oVCpP5RJvqzkw5kIm7IvuLDEhYdX2R1aEQcZk7qZ7-obbArJa1ySBHPIKgArseKp62zAh3oDCkxQgbhH0OwtXsPGDpDAsqvcfVHdg%3D%3D) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

name: VP Mike Pence
subject: I’ve got some BIG news!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Advancing American Freedom
body:
I have prayed over this day for a long time. I am sharing my story with the American people–the good, the bad, the blessings i

| |
---
| | | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi80ratb75jfl0v26utkcoa78a3cnd7559ppgvj0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3jm0pr4c5h2bs)
---

Mike Pence here, did you hear the news?

_**[I have prayed over this day for a long time. I am sharing my story with the American people-the good, the bad, the blessings included. I have a special copy reserved for you. Want to hear more?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zuva4a1r03b4kedfdv8ksq0j4rskpacsm3mas5dg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3jm0pr4c5h2bs "I have prayed over this day for a long time. I am sharing my story with the American people–the good, the bad, the blessings included. I have a special copy reserved for you. Want to hear more?")**_
**⬇️⬇️⬇️**

---
This is the inside story of the Trump administration from its second highest official--what I said to the president and how I was tested.

I share exclusively how the faith that I embraced as a young man guided each and every decision I made at 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue.

**I 'm giving you a look into every second of my experiences in public service, from the early lessons to the major accomplishments.**

I will forever remain grateful for the grace of God, the love and support of my family, and the blessings of liberty that are every American's birthright.
---

If you chip in $62 or more today to support my work to Advance American Freedom, I'll send you a signed copy.

I can't wait to share this journey with you.

For Faith & Freedom,
Vice President Mike Pence

Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.

Did you hear about this, team?

At a Young Republicans Gala last night, Marjorie Taylor Greene told the crowd that if she and Steve Bannon had organized the attack on the Capitol on January 6th, that they would've "won"... because they "would've been armed."

January 6th was already deadly. And here we have a sitting Republican Congresswoman, fantasizing about even deadlier violence. This is unacceptable and dangerous, but unfortunately it's perfectly aligned with everything we've come to expect from MTG and the increasingly extreme GOP. At nearly every turn, MAGA Republicans excuse or actively incite violence against minorities, against political rivals, and against our very democracy, and they must be stopped.

Now that they are about to take a narrow majority in the House, we cannot let them steer our national conversation towards hate and violence. name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Americans find this “British Bulldog” captivating
body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD. This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b0fe699d4fa94cbea6f8a2c8bec282d0&_e=_X4xgIGBxAVa-l6y37gBgkfWiiZQXifoAvPOfSr4RxEHqo9bZPrAKYHB-2tcVq5LuXARxAM-qSRJ_dum_E5PtPDYqYKWrUgs7uDgoLr6e1ZNSZOT75u3DEAIlUhD5ZNCERFzHk-pVE2oy1XRH_ZW7GasJUvRHX5OAJuGnHcRFzoLl9i9lRoOImag05Jb0O8HoEW8e9jY6HqlX93cF0in_nzxtYHlNB56VzmWzzPvwb09f4T8fmqMDfFG4IhSVpPXk2xyAOb_UKtNZtA7Kbnz5eh1EUKD-0RKGHjjY1q1bdJFnTrkYNBTlknxHNwjth7QiHgGbhz8oPnJvAGk49Cq4Nu0AUOBE4nMs5h5wfEHa8rU6qxe-COeXCpyVcHBbueNyDieAgUXciheWCy6KekKkQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College's most popular online courses, **" Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,"** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the "British Bulldog" captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many "academics" and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill's accomplishments more important than ever. **For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set:** **_[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b0fe699d4fa94cbea6f8a2c8bec282d0&_e=_X4xgIGBxAVa-l6y37gBgkfWiiZQXifoAvPOfSr4RxEHqo9bZPrAKYHB-2tcVq5LuXARxAM-qSRJ_dum_E5PtPDYqYKWrUgs7uDgoLr6e1ZNSZOT75u3DEAIlUhD5ZNCERFzHk-pVE2oy1XRH_ZW7GasJUvRHX5OAJuGnHcRFzoLl9i9lRoOImag05Jb0O8HoEW8e9jY6HqlX93cF0in_nzxtYHlNB56VzmWzzPvwb09f4T8fmqMDfFG4IhSVpPXal8DwCnXfxk0WKVJzuCEdzBg8kH4OiUEJtrb_vhIg0MLogw8y2SRXQCwONmKHqjUGy-pO49SUfbd_vP-hTcWgTceFAiDTWbVFjUBACfvbvb06te9yNJhz_fpfdoHEMpW3f_aYSbFcvhcWhDpxBvH8Q%3D%3D)_** As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b0fe699d4fa94cbea6f8a2c8bec282d0&_e=_X4xgIGBxAVa-l6y37gBgkfWiiZQXifoAvPOfSr4RxEHqo9bZPrAKYHB-2tcVq5LuXARxAM-qSRJ_dum_E5PtPDYqYKWrUgs7uDgoLr6e1ZNSZOT75u3DEAIlUhD5ZNCERFzHk-pVE2oy1XRH_ZW7GasJUvRHX5OAJuGnHcRFzoLl9i9lRoOImag05Jb0O8HoEW8e9jY6HqlX93cF0in_nzxtYHlNB56VzmWzzPvwb09f4T8fmqMDfFG4IhSVpPX1kN9zV_QTbnvb8rpYgyUA04tv5r7xFSA6e3EsgSza4Hi5kJQK8NXtpROATTANHCvcZKCZPzaDJzVsmmyqMvOV_R1NaSpQzHUGthr7hkpar8BtO4RxQNcCnIDIKAUqR1huXZvjE4tr6gDVdr1vaygKQ%3D%3D) Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you'll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift--before they're gone. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of **" Winston Churchill and Statesmanship**" on DVD: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b0fe699d4fa94cbea6f8a2c8bec282d0&_e=_X4xgIGBxAVa-l6y37gBgkfWiiZQXifoAvPOfSr4RxEHqo9bZPrAKYHB-2tcVq5LuXARxAM-qSRJ_dum_E5PtPDYqYKWrUgs7uDgoLr6e1ZNSZOT75u3DEAIlUhD5ZNCERFzHk-pVE2oy1XRH_ZW7GasJUvRHX5OAJuGnHcRFzoLl9i9lRoOImag05Jb0O8HoEW8e9jY6HqlX93cF0in_nzxtYHlNB56VzmWzzPvwb09f4T8fmqMDfFG4IhSVpPXwC8a46n2UERSvcCP7vbrLoXqKIMOTcS4IH1w_rsnCNgy4bwY_17mN-i7wJDJ8-BLvHUc1KL_cYPogKus9jmcWcQXpSo09rMCmiUrvGlg4ReKFzQLK9YgD89Ghi5Gnqgu8gRmp-_SRIbfqMKnTNoCHQ%3D%3D)_ You'll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill's words and deeds.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College |

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: What’s the difference between Georgia and Texas?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE, POWEREDXPEOPLE
body:
I’m grateful to the people of Georgia for electing Raphael Warnock to a
full term in the United States Senate last week, and I’m grateful to
everyone who got behind him in Georgia and throughout the country to make
it possible.

This victory is testament to Warnock's work in the Senate, his
effectiveness as a candidate and to the decade-long organizing and
infrastructure push led by Stacey Abrams, the New Georgia Project and so
many others as well as the extraordinary amount of money invested in the
state.

In just the last two years $1.4 billion has been spent on just four races
in Georgia, including Warnock’s. Investments in data, voter contact,
technology and communications have enabled strong Democratic candidates to
triumph over weaker Republican ones in what was once thought to be a
reliably Red state. Without that investment, as strong a candidate as
Warnock is, the deeply flawed Herschel Walker would have been able to ride
entrenched partisan affiliation to victory.

By way of comparison, though the recent Texas governor’s race set
fundraising records for the state, the candidates only raised a combined
$220 million (Abbott $140m and I raised $80m). Add the 2020 Texas Senate
race where the candidates spent a combined $66 million, and you have the
only meaningful races in the same time period drawing five times less than
Georgia, a state that is three times smaller!

Money isn’t everything. Strong state and county parties, proven local
leaders, grassroots organizers, good candidates, all of that matters. But
to have the infrastructure — the reliable voter data and modeling, the
team of professionals who can run effective campaigns, the systems,
technology and coordinated efforts between stakeholders that are
strengthened year-in and year-out and not just rely on one or two big name
candidates or high profile races that come around every so often — we will
need big, consistent investment in Texas.

There’s a lot to learn from Georgia, and I look forward to continuing to
talk with the people who’ve led important recent victories there, like
Senator Warnock’s. But clearly, if Texas is going to be competitive on the
same level that Georgia is, we’re going to have to invest at a much higher
level.

Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20221212.3v69fN&refcode=ema20221212-218497&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=218497%2E444211%2EdLnCnj ]Contribute

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1002&akid=218497%2E444211%2EdLnCnj

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: my decision
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
As a Marine, a Latino, and someone with a record of standing up for working people, we can build a coalition that will win a 2-way race, 3-way race, 27-way race... doesn’t matter.
#

Peter -
Impulsive, emotional decisions are out of character for me.
I am the guy who had a four-year plan to get into Harvard even though my family was dirt poor.
So here is the truth about whether or not I am going to run against Senator Sinema:
Yes, I am thinking about it.
Yes, I have already been preparing for this possibility even before her party switch.
Yes, I believe that as a Marine, a Latino, and someone with a record of standing up for working people we can build a coalition that will win a 2-way race, 3-way race, 27-way race... doesn’t matter.
But what I need to know — more than ANYTHING else — is that the grassroots support is there. That’s the piece. If it’s there, this choice is easy.
So today, I am asking:
[**Please make a $3 contribution to my campaign. We will put it right to work making sure we have the resources we need to defeat Senator Sinema from day one.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=gallego-em-dec.PtsJUf&refcode=em221212-1-vsp-90&t=1&akid=214%2E734936%2Ee93hFG)

**⬇️⬇️⬇️**

---
This is the inside story of the Trump administration from its second highest official—what I said to the president and how I was tested.

I share exclusively how the faith that I embraced as a young man guided each and every decision I made at 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue.

**I’m giving you a look into every second of my experiences in public service, from the early lessons to the major accomplishments.**

I will forever remain grateful for the grace of God, the love and support of my family, and the blessings of liberty that are every American’s birthright.
---

If you chip in $62 or more today to support my work to Advance American Freedom, I’ll send you a signed copy.

I can’t wait to share this journey with you.

For Faith & Freedom,
Vice President Mike Pence

[ After narrowly losing her election to Democrat incumbent Arizona Governor Katie Hobbs, Trump-backed Republican candidate Kari Lake is suing Maricopa County over how her November 8th election was handled. Lake would lose the initial election by 17,117 votes statewide, out of a total of over 2.6 million votes counted, which falls barely outside the automatic recount margin of 0.5 percent. In total, Lake lost by a margin of 50.3%-49.7%. ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43560%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qv6vVE9wrNoUBbxNiYseng&sysid=1)

That’s the energy state Democrats are counting on as they go toe-to-toe with Republicans in competitive races across the country. But we’ll be frank, we were disappointed to see you haven’t renewed your membership for 2023 yet. name: Andy Biggs
subject: We can win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biggs for Congress
body:
Help me take back America First leadership
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zasugpeo2komd0oehdhe1vqad0qr6gs3m9lvc5hg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3ge0or2c3h2bs)
---
| Friend,
I’m up against the entire Washington Establishment and **they’re throwing everything they can at me to keep me from becoming Speaker...**
I’m sick and tired of the lies and empty promises Establishment RINOs give us year after year and I know you are too.
We have a new majority in the House and now is our time to take back REAL Conservative leadership...**[But I’ll need your help to defeat McCarthy.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zndkvd1s0gd1gijm3nmnm1qt6ijta7vr9dnfncv0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3ge0or2c3h2bs)** | | | | [FIGHT WITH ANDY](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrasqq6qt9fmhv1nmft362f3o73cbm15kq64cfc8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3ge0or2c3h2bs)
---
As you know, McCarthy is weak on holding the line against the Democrats' radical agenda, and has failed to provide the strong and decisive leadership that we need in the face of their constant attacks on our values.**

I’ve always fought for the conservative principles that make this country great, the same ones that bolstered the best economy we’ve seen in years before the pandemic.

America’s best days truly are ahead of us, **but only if we stand up to the establishment and take back leadership.**

I can do this as a Speaker, but I cannot get there without you.

**[Join my fight to defeat Kevin McCarthy and usher in a new era of America First leadership as Speaker of the House >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpuml00u83bjmacmnvselqle2qk8ff3oubs9cmj0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3ge0or2c3h2bs)**

Yours in Freedom,

Andy Biggs
Congressman, AZ-05
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3qu872l1u0r8b2tamt52n56v4ridfm0qplm1nu8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3ge0or2c3h2bs)
---
|

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: It’s a daunting Senate map in 2024 and Kyrsten Sinema's betrayal just made it that much more alarming. Our hopes rest in our commitment to taking action, starting now.
body:
2024 Senate map looks terrible
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta46e95a6-4ed5-4a58-902e-fe805812854e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, | _**We are looking at a daunting Senate map in 2024 and Kyrsten Sinema's betrayal just made it that much more alarming.**_ [**_Can you rush a donation of $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to the Senate Majority PAC so they can start preparing for this fight as soon as possible?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T70284b3b-feee-4add-9c94-b1a717420763/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _In two years, not only must we re-elect President Joe Biden, but several Democrats in red or purple states. This includes great progressive and center-left leaders in the Senate such as Jon Tester (MT), Tammy Baldwin (WI), Sherrod Brown (OH), John Casey (PA), Tim Kaine (VA) and Jacky Rosen (NV)._
---

|

Can you rush a donation of $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to the Senate Majority PAC so they can start preparing for this fight as soon as possible?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9eef9a4b-5766-45d5-8ea6-51261b345bcd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you my friends, Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Andy Biggs
subject: We can win, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biggs for Congress
body:
Help me take back America First leadership
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkcd7g3jbv5nkum0dqeeaj0cjiiug0pikkk8p41o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3jm9pr2c9h2bs)
---
| Friend,
I’m up against the entire Washington Establishment and **they’re throwing everything they can at me to keep me from becoming Speaker...**
I’m sick and tired of the lies and empty promises Establishment RINOs give us year after year and I know you are too.
We have a new majority in the House and now is our time to take back REAL Conservative leadership...**[But I’ll need your help to defeat McCarthy.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrdhs79cu36hmrdii5kth8ee99i39iku6cblfeu8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3jm9pr2c9h2bs)** | | | | [FIGHT WITH ANDY](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqn4m8bd9lidlp7o9e5ibum8nfuk00lsa5n59ja8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3jm9pr2c9h2bs)
---
As you know, McCarthy is weak on holding the line against the Democrats' radical agenda, and has failed to provide the strong and decisive leadership that we need in the face of their constant attacks on our values.**

I’ve always fought for the conservative principles that make this country great, the same ones that bolstered the best economy we’ve seen in years before the pandemic.

America’s best days truly are ahead of us, **but only if we stand up to the establishment and take back leadership.**

I can do this as a Speaker, but I cannot get there without you.

**[Join my fight to defeat Kevin McCarthy and usher in a new era of America First leadership as Speaker of the House >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb06i8dhhom98qvbi66jiv8qtd0csmq9qmjmrkqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr0c3jm9pr2c9h2bs)**

Yours in Freedom,

Andy Biggs
Congressman, AZ-05

---

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Fighting for the lives of the unborn
body:
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten--or ignored--some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f8945c279ee049878d6f261fa4521738&_e=3JuVw1xXrbLW31IutVh7PW11KkwmmpRpHdeD5Z6LfcDKis4EclDkcdqxXoEjwj7ZZ7ZD7IYGiB0gNBlxyidVb9-QaGNCMI5646UZGW0943vULBMsU3QHJYXKyfGqUPXTCcfonNcczOAWqAe4z5JtaKczRpqTqXEugFO_4ZNFXm95UAQkp_tAfrWIa4xv9-bjWa4U8h8XnylaVrn0kxGYMy1gxNGuTjHDky4COcNkdfR6oWVC2kJmQt3wwQGgN34u54sQKKgbNaLogFc_c6YEzE1wbXyw9KopXLtm1ORwXwOuFbM6ohiAEIKwKms0yp0gHkkfTZASWDIRnWr404pZU53LYDsVqsHFcszH2XMeMlGo-UnTswUgepXlRVrT3hzN)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I'm not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I've started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f8945c279ee049878d6f261fa4521738&_e=3JuVw1xXrbLW31IutVh7PW11KkwmmpRpHdeD5Z6LfcDKis4EclDkcdqxXoEjwj7ZZ7ZD7IYGiB0gNBlxyidVb9-QaGNCMI5646UZGW0943vULBMsU3QHJYXKyfGqUPXTCcfonNcczOAWqAe4z5JtaKczRpqTqXEugFO_4ZNFXm95UAQkp_tAfrWIa4xv9-bjWa4U8h8XnylaVrn0kxGYMy1gxNGuTjHDky4COcNkdfR5XoAek9BmLz0o_3Lv_UP4qBeywp0rgeX7MrQpdTdj1GjAdaPQb8WNHqgupFCm-A4JSq8NTN6nR3A77IsopNI6pIkkniFBPjFX_tNa5L_poCzU9qDrwQkV3RrBDX7t7X8W9_Rio8Q-8zIej5Doejc2) I've created a new pro-life pledge; I'd love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f8945c279ee049878d6f261fa4521738&_e=3JuVw1xXrbLW31IutVh7PW11KkwmmpRpHdeD5Z6LfcDKis4EclDkcdqxXoEjwj7ZZ7ZD7IYGiB0gNBlxyidVb9-QaGNCMI5646UZGW0943vULBMsU3QHJYXKyfGqUPXTCcfonNcczOAWqAe4z5JtaKczRpqTqXEugFO_4ZNFXm95UAQkp_tAfrWIa4xv9-bjWa4U8h8XnylaVrn0kxGYMy1gxNGuTjHDky4COcNkdfRM4glyXzrKkPuO4itfG8BDoqHt2FiKrOTPmG5SMPEWmT4iVBg9gWozq7i2RROXo_zNIkxhWglkSeSXHnfKfVKQsjJSLLvDYIK2HJKGA0s4AcKqxKhMtPCUxrdl5SJwVIl3DhoFSe_1OHaQZ_sOADY0) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

| | Friend, Last Saturday, former President Donald Trump claimed that “A Massive Fraud of this type and magnitude allows for the termination of all rules, regulations, and articles, even those found in the Constitution.” Yes, friend, you read that correctly. **He _is_ suggesting that the Constitution be terminated. And he is _still_ attempting to overturn the 2020 election. ** And so far, _one of the only_ Republican Senators who have condemned this attack on our Constitution — and who will be in the next Congress to put a check on extremism — is Alaska’s own **Lisa Murkowski**.
| [**PUT A CHECK ON EXTREMISM »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55888757/383160618/1859846009?amount=25&utm_campaign=em_221212_trump&utm_source=em&utm_medium=em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWJmZDgyOS04MjdhLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S4b718Ufg2GfwPR2pGalrNBxvtlyiHzWX9Hz5Vt-2is=&emci=7e1974f2-6e7a-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=d5bfd829-827a-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=9512399)
---
**This much is clear: Former President Donald Trump is too extreme for our country.**
The blatant, anti-democratic sentiments held by the former president have no place in our nation.
**When our democracy is threatened, it’s critical that we show up to protect it.** That means amplifying the voices of those in power, like Lisa Murkowski, who will uphold the sanctity of our elections. It is especially meaningful and important that she is a member of his party. It shows that _**standing up to Trump is not partisanship — it’s standing up for our democracy. **_
[_**Will you make a contribution today to help us continue to defy extremism and empower pro-democracy candidates like Lisa Murkowski?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55888758/383160619/1859846009?amount=25&utm_campaign=em_221212_trump&utm_source=em&utm_medium=em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWJmZDgyOS04MjdhLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S4b718Ufg2GfwPR2pGalrNBxvtlyiHzWX9Hz5Vt-2is=&emci=7e1974f2-6e7a-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=d5bfd829-827a-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=9512399)

clean_body: Putting an end to extremism is a constant fight. | | | Friend, Last Saturday, former President Donald Trump claimed that “A Massive Fraud of this type and magnitude allows for the termination of all rules, regulations, and articles, even those found in the Constitution.” Yes, friend, you read that correctly. He is suggesting that the Constitution be terminated. And he is still attempting to overturn the 2020 election. And so far, one of the only Republican Senators who have condemned this attack on our Constitution — and who will be in the next Congress to put a check on extremism — is Alaska’s own Lisa Murkowski. | This much is clear: Former President Donald Trump is too extreme for our country. The blatant, anti-democratic sentiments held by the former president have no place in our nation. When our democracy is threatened, it’s critical that we show up to protect it. That means amplifying the voices of those in power, like Lisa Murkowski, who will uphold the sanctity of our elections. It is especially meaningful and important that she is a member of his party. It shows that standing up to Trump is not partisanship — it’s standing up for our democracy. Putting an end to extremism is a constant fight, and we hope you’ll join us in defending our democratic values today. name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: China is WATCHING
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress
body:
| | | Peter, TikTok has spread like wildfire across young people in America.

But what they don’t know is that the Chinese-owned company is using this dancing app to funnel YOUR information DIRECTLY to the Chinese Communist Party.

I certainly won’t let my kids have TikTok on their phones, but I want to know what YOU think.

**[Do you think TikTok is a national security threat?](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=741c056745d6414b9b58260f0f6ceb2f&_e=-dXlPORqk2DlE4_S9xhzuWaDMYXjWjZonr1f5rX5lq7c_xO-Vl0svrGWhE5no0eOh2-BI8vFiyvVFfc9-15TPJyC6C2OyPrp5_Z44XRfqf836DSbKfd2RSuI8TySTxbeKk2BmTfravbjRQE-hsWP8cnahnQEOvEX-TErfmLMhmSwBp27Gq63CDgvwIDWJkdA8u4dHLw-W09NDLLlY1p4nt3EDINeCq4rQywPK6BD43kvvnM0raJWcWLdUuRoh87ufpOUCOqfppATNrU10K1pxYkA4V0llrt4OuOcyFGpJUicPOBov58n5pcFkynbMGK7KSa0KReIuS6Zncc7P1-aUw%3D%3D)**

Mike Waltz Special Forces Green Beret U.S. Congressman (FL-6) | | | | Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress | | Michael Waltz is a member of the Army National Guard. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch: Secret Service Has Repeatedly Changed Story on Existence of Hunter Biden Gun Records
body:
Judicial Watch is investigating whether and how the Secret Service intervened for Hunter Biden in an incident involving a gun allegedly owned by him.

| | |
---
---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Dec 12, 2022
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61375&L=28524&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaHVudGVyLWJpZGVuLWd1bi1yZWNvcmRzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE) | **[Judicial Watch: Secret Service Has Repeatedly Changed Story on Existence of Hunter Biden Gun Records](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61375&L=28524&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaHVudGVyLWJpZGVuLWd1bi1yZWNvcmRzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)** Judicial Watch announced recently that the United States Secret Service has repeatedly changed its position about whether it is in possession of records related to the investigation of Hunter Biden’s gun, reportedly disposed of in a dumpster in Delaware. The Secret Service now says it now located over 100 records, totaling over 400 pages and will complete its initial processing of the records by January 9, 2023. | | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61375&L=28525&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdXMtdG8tZW1wb3dlci13b3JrZXJzLWluLWxhdGluLWFtZXJpY2EvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=) | **[Soros-Funded Nonprofit Gets $12 Mil from U.S. to Empower Workers in Latin America](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61375&L=28525&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdXMtdG8tZW1wb3dlci13b3JrZXJzLWluLWxhdGluLWFtZXJpY2EvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=)** The Biden administration is giving a nonprofit partially funded by leftwing billionaire George Soros’s Open Society Foundations (OSF) $12 million to strengthen labor rights and empower workers in three Latin American countries. The U.S. taxpayer dollars will go to the Solidarity Center, a Washington D.C.-based group closely allied with OSF as well as the country’s largest union conglomerate, the American Federation of Labor and Congress of Industrial Organizations (AFL-CIO). [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61375&L=28525&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdXMtdG8tZW1wb3dlci13b3JrZXJzLWluLWxhdGluLWFtZXJpY2EvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1DTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0Q=)

Uncle Sam will pay for workshops that will help employees and leadership at Indian companies create awareness about transgender persons and their rights. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The 2023 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional is here
body:
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1ed69775576c429da17c8b7d10bfbfd3&_e=2INIvLvnwOo9TBWc8uy2CVN1hlRxmE-7enAZB5TpWdrQvnfRIlVwpLctczQP_70nJEQx__Ogeh3T7H2vlpnND6nU89_LfsflQD0y7YbDPOZdqEMs5tzei23o4_CGOOtLEJ0cWlWhvmH9riZLCub2IbVsoiGLd_ZmlQv7J4eUySNpVnKCoHvREyb2tgUDfdSLM2WN7dU2WWbkdIoZZGPbFxl705_UkxPob-spFniqNn8Facghjacz_dUL2TsK2gglZZPa19K6g2xj-pcaJniwhF3m9kLbHeb5MLLRArZQmPDbYsfN4pyrj2uafn-tmGt2WljSlQIsdyqLByGXgoFZnm60sHiLHDOt-r-T61qyZX1XYyLbykLswGkkTKCKiw0X)
---
Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That’s why I’ve written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we’ll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* From January to February, we’ll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we’ll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we’ll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we’ll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---
[Request your 2023 Daily Devotional](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1ed69775576c429da17c8b7d10bfbfd3&_e=2INIvLvnwOo9TBWc8uy2CVN1hlRxmE-7enAZB5TpWdrQvnfRIlVwpLctczQP_70nJEQx__Ogeh3T7H2vlpnND6nU89_LfsflQD0y7YbDPOZdqEMs5tzei23o4_CGOOtLEJ0cWlWhvmH9riZLCub2IbVsoiGLd_ZmlQv7J4eUySNpVnKCoHvREyb2tgUDfdSLM2WN7dU2WWbkdIoZZGPbFxl705_UkxPob-spFniqNn9chN_Z67JhqZQo-1U58TDpwBHdbd3S7MrgPGddQ6QxuYmZtjKo0txLPhWVkcRvAQ5bWxBZKvNyk4gmjRoPPY8f6VKQ6NR5mypzZX6P0V7_pwjWdqUc2oBfHnPQn6JKUYUO2mxFH4RRtUDbuuqlYxz0)
---
| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1ed69775576c429da17c8b7d10bfbfd3&_e=2INIvLvnwOo9TBWc8uy2CVN1hlRxmE-7enAZB5TpWdrQvnfRIlVwpLctczQP_70nJEQx__Ogeh3T7H2vlpnND6nU89_LfsflQD0y7YbDPOZdqEMs5tzei23o4_CGOOtLEJ0cWlWhvmH9riZLCub2IbVsoiGLd_ZmlQv7J4eUySNpVnKCoHvREyb2tgUDfdSLM2WN7dU2WWbkdIoZZGPbFxl705_UkxPob-spFniqNn-_ibFIFvOid26gW3_ZMV_0T8VbQVUl7MeO0hOhQeYZTlH47g3VxE8ZkYVEjk-u93cLZbodYi8JSQHHrsNjvxMMP0alaV9ugOA5pnkSfLa4HfeaJVtqTKxYmoJr5l5Z6wba9082G0qKDyw5gS59LiJ9)
---
| The _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day.
---
| | We’re offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ this month. **And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31.** To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/light-in-the-darkness-matching-challenge/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=1ed69775576c429da17c8b7d10bfbfd3&_e=2INIvLvnwOo9TBWc8uy2CVN1hlRxmE-7enAZB5TpWdrQvnfRIlVwpLctczQP_70nJEQx__Ogeh3T7H2vlpnND6nU89_LfsflQD0y7YbDPOZdqEMs5tzei23o4_CGOOtLEJ0cWlWhvmH9riZLCub2IbVsoiGLd_ZmlQv7J4eUySNpVnKCoHvREyb2tgUDfdSLM2WN7dU2WWbkdIoZZGPbFxl705_UkxPob-spFniqNn8d63SgO5ECWoL9GJcZLdnpNPpa9504egJ9I8zrlUyayr8ODGFT68qwEJP_qeAj0LGvr1CD1KNkx2iMLHd8BcL7tr3iaH7R4td7sd7owO6Mef8cpVoLiF_BejWvngU4bX8bZWYvkbb-sKwlgDRLbBKn) What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? What do you think we would accomplish? I’m excited to find out. Thanks for your partnership with this ministry. Sharing the Truth of God’s Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress
