name: Ryan Chamberlin Campaign
subject: Important Announcement!
body:
| | Hey friends.. It's official! Today I launched my candidacy for District 24 State House in Florida. And I wanted you to be among the first to know :) More details to come soon so stay tuned... _**PRESS RELEASE from 12-12-22**_ **CONSERVATIVE BUSINESSMAN RYAN CHAMBERLIN ANNOUNCES CANDIDACY FOR HOUSE DISTRICT 24 ** **BELLEVIEW, FL** – Today, Ryan Chamberlin, Ocala businessman and a past candidate for Congress, launched his campaign for state representative in House District 24. “Over the past several months, my wife and I had been approached by many people in Marion County about running for the seat being vacated by State Representative Stan McClain due to term limits, said Chamberlin. "Although Stan was our Rep for years, due to recent redistricting we would need to consider moving at least 1 mile or more from where we currently live because we know how important it is to keep true conservatives in the Legislature who will stand with Gov. Ron DeSantis against the establishment and woke liberals.” Chamberlin added: “Our hearts were broken over the announcement made last week by Rep. Joe Harding that he was stepping down from his legislative seat. Joe has been a fighter who has been willing to put it all on the line for the conservative movement. There is no doubt that his commitment to principle and his being the co-sponsor of the “Parental Rights in Education” legislation made him a target for the left and the Biden Department of Justice. We need someone to step right up where he left off to continue to fight for the people and families of the free state of Florida.” “I have lived in what is now District 24 for over 35 years, and it seems that God was perhaps already leading me and my family to consider this next step of service. I filed my paperwork, and I will be working hard to earn the support of conservatives in Marion County. We will run an aggressive grassroots campaign and will be outlining a comprehensive vision over the course of the campaign that includes my commitment to the following:
* Parental Rights in Education, including School Choice
* Pro-Life Legislation
* Pro-Second Amendment protections
* Border Security Initiatives
* Tax cuts
* Property insurance reform

Ryan Chamberlin is an Author, Speaker and Consultant that has been working for the last 2 years to launch The True Patriot Network (TPN), a conservative social media and news platform supporting strong American values. Ryan has worked with _Success _Magazine, speaks regularly at national conferences, and recently co-authored his 5th book titled _Think Big_ which became an international best seller in May of 2022. His 3rd book titled _The Rich You Formula_ , was co-authored with the late relationship expert Gary Smalley and endorsed by Mike Huckabee. Ryan has been married to Jenny Chamberlin for 28 years. They met at Souls Harbor First Pentecostal Church in 1989, where they still attend. Jenny is the founder of JentlyMade, a home care product company, home-schooled their 4 adult children for a total of 18 years, and is a recording artist with one of her songs hitting the top of the Christian indie charts in 2007.
---

12305 SE 55th Avenue Rd
Belleview FL 34420
USA

[Unsubscribe](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?bCwM7JxMLLQcbIxMDKycnLRGtKwsLAyMnAxs) | [Change Subscriber Options](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?bCwM7JxMLLQcbIxMDKycnLRGtKwsLAyMnAxs)

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: I’m done
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
---
| | I won’t mince words: – First, I watched Democrats defy the odds and defeat nearly every last Republican election denier in the midterms. – Then, I watched Trump, McCarthy, and McConnell pivot to 2024 to get their revenge. – Now, I’m watching them BEG right-wing special interests for cash to help them do it. I mean every word I’m about to say: [**_We have a historic opportunity to win BACK-TO-BACK elections, keep extremist Republicans OUT of power for good, and make this the ERA of Democratic progress. But we can’t do it if we let Republicans’ schemes go unchecked. Here’s my plan: I’m calling on another 890 Democrats to become Founding Donors for the next election before midnight. I know it seems early, but trust me when I say our work starts now — especially when Republicans are openly scheming ways to defeat our Democrats, regain power, and decimate our democracy. Can I count on you to chip in $15 before midnight? | Friend,
I'm up against the entire Washington Establishment and **they 're throwing everything they can at me to keep me from becoming Speaker...**
I'm sick and tired of the lies and empty promises Establishment RINOs give us year after year and I know you are too.
We have a new majority in the House and now is our time to take back REAL Conservative leadership...**[But I'll need your help to defeat McCarthy.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f557e07e09854b6d8c08796938fd2e03&_e=rYNNlG3jbT-s8LLcnb4ZlfXZUolCMtftJIY1HvgcrNs-w0NVp05slHFIS0dXV_ChCa9qvu2YlR0u28kYZegJcmZ-b-aVGoHdXttYr1V90LZDmIl5K9Lo6jjxKCRKASY8ZHq0l4oVs5EXamtJe4Kw0r18FNydvjNBcSyIi80xB1yJX_P642rggwgeRTn7CHPPmbWa1o0JRoSGsr_92wS9q7gDB5edc-AmfJDrZGXYpu6nxmLrI1gKTU6om5wdv6XgzN-m80G3WHn09HySYBXI2gL4DUB1WqB6RXr8zFxkrUYS6dyRIq4RMF36hG1ck59E)** | | | | [FIGHT WITH ANDY](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f557e07e09854b6d8c08796938fd2e03&_e=rYNNlG3jbT-s8LLcnb4ZlfXZUolCMtftJIY1HvgcrNs-w0NVp05slHFIS0dXV_ChCa9qvu2YlR0u28kYZegJcmZ-b-aVGoHdXttYr1V90LZDmIl5K9Lo6jjxKCRKASY8ZHq0l4oVs5EXamtJe4Kw0r18FNydvjNBcSyIi80xB1xE0m8b2I4TT7oNJdafxqQ5c52ESbomQala3tUGLTBZTwgi4UpWFKeOoqyWkbIELgZylmY-RgV_VZG7JTf5RKrjDE0lFoU-LkmsRJTNgOWN5zObpQVsrD27NhkI1HVIlzvlTBbHpX5WiRQo75Ee-OIK)

As you know, McCarthy is weak on holding the line against the Democrats' radical agenda, and has failed to provide the strong and decisive leadership that we need in the face of their constant attacks on our values.

I've always fought for the conservative principles that make this country great, the same ones that bolstered the best economy we've seen in years before the pandemic.

America's best days truly are ahead of us, **but only if we stand up to the establishment and take back leadership.**

I can do this as a Speaker, but I cannot get there without you.

**[Join my fight to defeat Kevin McCarthy and usher in a new era of America First leadership as Speaker of the House>>](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f557e07e09854b6d8c08796938fd2e03&_e=rYNNlG3jbT-s8LLcnb4ZlfXZUolCMtftJIY1HvgcrNs-w0NVp05slHFIS0dXV_ChCa9qvu2YlR0u28kYZegJcmZ-b-aVGoHdXttYr1V90LZDmIl5K9Lo6jjxKCRKASY8ZHq0l4oVs5EXamtJe4Kw0r18FNydvjNBcSyIi80xB1yYq9GW6v4rhije50bF8wKrD5Om3Zo-CYbaCIsGsUE9UjdEySQzbpzPWAwuVH4dhlsgtYS1_EDCYeVxZES3fSX1yHxT5rQrApz5iGYOR9pan25s6-xLfHI28gvGKoixAW1D8SvrjDbAcJ8OTCO_vwUL)**

Yours in Freedom,

Andy Biggs

| | If there’s one thing we’ve proven over the past two years, it’s that Georgia’s status as a battleground state is unquestionable.

We’ve elected President Biden and Vice President Harris, flipped both of our Senate seats blue, flipped 40+ municipal seats, KEPT our Senate seats blue, and, despite redistricting and heavy GOP gerrymandering, flipped state House and Senate seats!

We can’t afford to rest on our laurels and think that these gains will continue if we don’t continue to fight for them.

Thankfully, a federal judge stepped in to protect New Yorkers’ Second Amendment rights. Peter, the Second Amendment codifies a person’s right to protect themselves and their loved ones. It was written for EVERYONE , not just those in power. Peter, I’m taking on these radical Leftists working to disarm us, but it’s going to take ALL of us to protect our Second Amendment rights. Add your name to protect the 2A. | | Thank you,Claudia Tenney | Contributions to WinRed are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. body:
Peter, should we keep the filibuster??

| **ONE:** The filibuster is a Senate rule that requires a supermajority to pass legislation. _Republicans have used it to block progress on issues such as voting and civil rights!_

**TWO:** President Biden is renewing his push for an assault weapons ban... but the bill stands little chance of breaking the Senate filibuster.

**THREE:** The Senate just passed a bill protecting same-sex and interracial marriage... _after a filibuster was defeated!_

**Here’s the bottom line: The Senate filibuster rule has led to legislative paralysis.**

name: SHOCKING REPORT via VPP
subject: knife in the back (Kyrsten Sinema)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
we need to replace her with a real Democrat
| **This news just SHOCKED us:** [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37477?t=6&akid=5808%2E878179%2Eus7sRj) Kyrsten Sinema just turned her back on Democrats and announced she’s leaving the Party. This feels like a knife in the back.

AND it puts our entire Senate Majority in peril.

Now that she’s rejected Democrats altogether, we need to expand our Senate Majority and replace her with a REAL Democrat – one that won’t betray us. That’s why starting right now we’re starting a 2024 Arizona Senate Fund to defeat Kyrsten Sinema and we need $25,000 to get started!

[**_This changes everything. Please chip in anything you can afford to expand our Democratic Majority in Arizona:_**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37477?t=7&akid=5808%2E878179%2Eus7sRj) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37478?t=8&akid=5808%2E878179%2Eus7sRj)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Amanda=20St.=20George?=
subject: FW: We need to rebuild for success in 2023 and beyond
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
It's going to take time and money to rebuild... | | |
---
| | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=af90ffa18b&e=6a281f566d)
---
| |
---
| Peter,

I wanted to make sure that you saw the below email from our Executive Director, Brady Batt, about starting the next 2-year cycle STRONG. We need engaged people like you to [step-up](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=7a78f4dec6&e=6a281f566d) and [support](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=ab794c08b9&e=6a281f566d) our efforts EARLY for the best chance of success in the 2023 and 2024 elections.

Monthly donors are the back bone of our party - they keep the lights on and help us budget and implement our plans for victory. The sooner we can establish a budget, the better our chances are of victory. I myself contribute [$10 per month](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=96d872ef01&e=6a281f566d) to the party and I hope you will consider joining me! It is not a large committment, but if we have enough people making even a [$5 monthly](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=e6b10b8013&e=6a281f566d) contribution, the impact multiplies FAST!

[Please consider joining me by becoming an early monthly donor and lets start the next two year cycle strong and ready to win!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=b900c90428&e=6a281f566d)

Warm regards,

Amanda St. George
Director of Administrative Services
Washington State Republican Party
---
|
---
| **BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE:**
From: Brady Batt, Executive Director
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Peter, I'll be honest - it is going to take time and money to rebuild the Washington State Republican Party infrastructure for success in 2023 and beyond - and if we want to do it right, we need [support](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=d73626760a&e=6a281f566d) from engaged people like you.

We need your support so that we can recruit, train, and support good candidates for city council races, school board races, and other local offices and special election candidates in 2023. All of this work will help us lay the groundwork for success in 2024 within our targeted congressional races and other important statewide offices. **We must re-build and re-brand our party's communications capabilites to show that we WILL address the challenges facing everyday Washingtonians.**

**We've said it before, but we'll say it again: sustaining donors really make all the difference here at the Washington State Republican Party. **

We budget like you and your family do - we need to make sure our bills are paid, we put a bit away for rainy days - and anything left over goes towards building out our infrastructure to elect Republicans in our state.

When we know our budget in advance - your dollars make an even greater impact, and it doesn't take much to make a big difference.

Big checks are great, [but even $10 a month will help us establish our budget early so we can work on strengthening our digital organization, help fund candidates, and reach our friends and neighbors where they are. ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=c030987cab&e=6a281f566d)
---
| [BECOME A SUSTAINING DONOR](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=b0a2aebce5&e=6a281f566d "BECOME A SUSTAINING DONOR")
---
| We need your help to build a strong foundation for both 2023 and 2024. Chip in [$10](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=5745070795&e=6a281f566d), [$5](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=feb4857af6&e=6a281f566d), [or whatever you can afford](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=60a0b105ec&e=6a281f566d) each month to rebuild our party and change the future of Washington politics.

Thank you for your support, Peter!

Brady Batt
Executive Director
Washington State Republican Party

name: NEGOP
subject: Barger Requests Recount in District 26 Legislative Race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY This email was sent by: Nebraska Republican Party 1610 N Street, Lincoln, NE, 68508
body:
PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY This email was sent by: Nebraska Republican Party 1610 N Street, Lincoln, NE, 68508
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.ne.gop/so/aeOK8a9aJ/c?w=AKRcEcJ-lLDrC7uykX1rRDUtwwGhj5duIlI1-5Wg0ZM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmUuZ29wL3NvL2FlT0s4YTlhSj9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjQxOGMxNzYxLWVkZDMtNGMxYS1iMDY0LWMwYmFjOWQwMjY0ZiJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | Russ Barger who ran for the Nebraska Legislature in District 26 is requesting a recount of votes cast in his race. He is asking that the recount be done not with tabulating machines but instead with a verified hand count of each ballot cast. This is not unprecedented. Last week in Iowa, a hand [recount](https://www.ne.gop/so/aeOK8a9aJ/c?w=gOiMa90LTPgjlrapi1a8FrVDRp5DZSKvlGTxON9BN3Q.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZGVzbW9pbmVzcmVnaXN0ZXIuY29tL3N0b3J5L25ld3MvcG9saXRpY3MvZWxlY3Rpb25zLzIwMjIvMTIvMDgvcmVwdWJsaWNhbi1sdWFuYS1zdG9sdGVuYmVyZy13aW5zLWlvd2Etc2VhdC1hZnRlci1zZWNvbmQtcmVjb3VudC82OTcxMjM5NjAwNy8_ZmJjbGlkPUl3QVIwV195dGE3WGVhZm9seXpRdHlwR1VmSFg4YWtyWFRCS2xReUo4dzV1ZjM2ZllnWEIzaHRUVjZ3a1EiLCJyIjoiNjljNWI3NmEtODQ5Mi00MjVjLTk2OTUtMTJlZTlkZGE1ZDM0IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0) flipped the Iowa legislative race to the Republican candidate in a razor-thin victory. The second recount in a close Iowa House race found the Republican candidate won by 11 votes, flipping the result from an initial recount that showed a Democrat leading. Hand recount flips Iowa legislative race [https://www.desmoinesregister.com/story/news/politics/elections/2022/12/08/republican-luana-stoltenberg-wins-iowa-seat-after-second-recount/69712396007/?fbclid=IwAR0W_yta7XeafolyzQtypGUfHX8akrXTBKlQyJ8w5uf36fYgXB3htTV6wkQ](https://www.ne.gop/so/aeOK8a9aJ/c?w=gOiMa90LTPgjlrapi1a8FrVDRp5DZSKvlGTxON9BN3Q.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZGVzbW9pbmVzcmVnaXN0ZXIuY29tL3N0b3J5L25ld3MvcG9saXRpY3MvZWxlY3Rpb25zLzIwMjIvMTIvMDgvcmVwdWJsaWNhbi1sdWFuYS1zdG9sdGVuYmVyZy13aW5zLWlvd2Etc2VhdC1hZnRlci1zZWNvbmQtcmVjb3VudC82OTcxMjM5NjAwNy8_ZmJjbGlkPUl3QVIwV195dGE3WGVhZm9seXpRdHlwR1VmSFg4YWtyWFRCS2xReUo4dzV1ZjM2ZllnWEIzaHRUVjZ3a1EiLCJyIjoiNjljNWI3NmEtODQ5Mi00MjVjLTk2OTUtMTJlZTlkZGE1ZDM0IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNDE4YzE3NjEtZWRkMy00YzFhLWIwNjQtYzBiYWM5ZDAyNjRmIn0) We support the Barger Recount and the request for hand-counting ballots. The NEGOP encourages legislation prioritizing election reform by establishing local control, providing the ability to hand count ballots, and establishing strong photo voter ID controls. Nebraskans want election security through Election Accountability & Voter Verification. The Secretary of State’s office estimated it would cost $11,000 to do a manual recount, as opposed to $6,000 for a machine recount. Since it is not a required, automatic recount, Barger must pay for it under state law, unless it changes the outcome. If that occurred, then the expense would be picked up by the state. Nebraskans can show their support to Russ Barger and the ability to hand count ballots by attending his hearing tomorrow COUNTY /CITY BUILDING, 555 S 10th St #108, Lincoln, NE 68508. Lancaster County District Judge Kevin McManaman has set a court hearing for 10 a.m. Tuesday on Barger’s request to require a hand recount. Nebraskans can also support Russ Barger through [donations](https://www.ne.gop/so/aeOK8a9aJ/c?w=h0HIKL1eykn0CG7UIJG82bZafNhckKT4GjFjoHB-ABw.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9ydXNzLWJhcmdlci1mb3ItbGVnaXNsYXR1cmUvZG9uYXRlIiwiciI6IjY5YzViNzZhLTg0OTItNDI1Yy05Njk1LTEyZWU5ZGRhNWQzNCIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjQxOGMxNzYxLWVkZDMtNGMxYS1iMDY0LWMwYmFjOWQwMjY0ZiJ9) to help offset the cost of the hand count and legal fees. The election must be certified by Dec 20.[https://secure.anedot.com/russ-barger-for-legislature/donate](https://www.ne.gop/so/aeOK8a9aJ/c?w=hNsceC3WuIRofmV3a2b-2q3Tor5ZQW_eYbV_yBdGNOs.)
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTYThis email was sent by: Nebraska Republican Party1610 N Street, Lincoln, NE, 68508
---
| | [**NEGOP Website** ](https://www.ne.gop/so/aeOK8a9aJ/c?w=bCYXkjeWwhAg7Gmy6gtAogAjZxbHGuJId3TEPS2c_qs.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmUuZ29wLyIsInIiOiI3OTQ0YjJmZS1kMzA5LTRiZjAtMzEwNy0zNWQyN2U5OTc3YjEiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI0MThjMTc2MS1lZGQzLTRjMWEtYjA2NC1jMGJhYzlkMDI2NGYifQ)
---
|
---
| | **You've received this email because you are a subscriber of _[this site](https://www.ne.gop/so/aeOK8a9aJ/c?w=2WtYA4Ry4foZZBIxuQuxP5e2CUL41tZi3cluID6vjPs.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmUuZ29wLyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjQxOGMxNzYxLWVkZDMtNGMxYS1iMDY0LWMwYmFjOWQwMjY0ZiJ9)_.**
---
**If you feel you received it by mistake or wish to unsubscribe, please _[click here](https://www.wixapis.com/email-marketing/v1/email-subscriptions/unsubscribe?payload=JWS.eyJraWQiOiJZbHZQV0U0aSIsImFsZyI6IkhTMjU2In0..3dsuSZlbOcYAhVihdqOl8znnvd0JV5WJrwbAXRIPdJg&language=en)_.**

body:

| | | | | | | | | [](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdkU-PnSAUxT8N7jT8eSPPhYu2LzPdzKbJvKTdEATk0REwgJn47Xsxtk0mGCLn4Lk_7zUj6Tm-Xq-E940eL1SSWTVupJhSAosyRvDQDfOkZjLhgWF2UYNCF2y8dEs3J2PKw4V3kzSc905F3zzGXk-yJ73UijNDZsIwn_SgZoyJHJjSzTI-SlkzYl8QfYYnG7Ul0324kIyuIaDJoPfJWZvr-yR0DCJ6MRctlM1tCmJK4i8nYs_Sxy0UxG70CdE-1cDkggWhpM2AtBUvvNFu86Ad-KeY45aUATGoRUi_Lm7eT0vBUTobauxRqD2IKowsrhItu1-dqrlSfO6GUDHYZHIWQBIzAEewpDX_uc8yMRRzwANC-_vHz_t3nvjVgi3C4jQYn8SH09C92_Bqs71o2qRRrx9uWVzuOUzHHtOpwzj_Z0T8K6L0-IzSo-90K-wu395e096GX7F9ebpTW036Dfayr-bfzTOkO7tGEb_9AX-IubE)

| Friend,
I’m up against the entire Washington Establishment and **they’re throwing everything they can at me to keep me from becoming Speaker...**
I’m sick and tired of the lies and empty promises Establishment RINOs give us year after year and I know you are too.
We have a new majority in the House and now is our time to take back REAL Conservative leadership...**[But I’ll need your help to defeat McCarthy.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdkUFvrSAQhX-N7jQ4eEUXLtretKvu2rt4G4KAXFIBA9jGf18wvjZpMETOwTOfM3JsOoL6vm9IV4qxBdbMvNQjIIAmLcC4QUM9zBOfmwkNGOGWD7xokTRML_XspYx3bT-kF-m819yZ8j72kgDqydAjNlwEGQS0pGWE4I4hYJyUy3iPcQ0FfijgOT1B8s3L-ktbL0UOSRqzYp-0UiG_T1Q4S52hcxSUq1B5SydP_3MW-JkZt9lY4CtcCuh8DvTaqiREv8kkbdFQI4XeTNIO_FMMbvNcJtHyhTKzLnreT4unI9PK5tijUHUQZRgWdSZadrNqnnMZ_dsNyp1VXoZAE4kLCdgliyn5y32WcTbKAz4hVC_kM7zd4GP6TDa1ixbJ-CPetUjduw6vKqhWQOlHsX7pZdGhI2k66phOHsb5P2NBHguA4zOAo--wRXxj7--vfq_sP1e9XG6gsglPaY_7Kn9uniH12TUoyPUbts-5LQ)** | | | | [FIGHT WITH ANDY](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdkUFvpSAUhX-N7jQK-tSFi05fXldNumkn6YYgXJGMgAFMx38_F-PMJA2GyDnew-e9MNa3rur7vu5uuRwbwutZ5HokFSE1LkJpXQ3lME9irqdqoBVtxCCypgLD9VrOHiAu2v4CL_F8lMKZfBmB1y1AM0wTiKGde9LWXVe1EmvbgcoqX8clxi1k9CkjD3wCiN1D-aWtB5lCUONWHpNWKqT3iUlnmTNsjpIJFQpv2eTZX86MPrhxu40ZvZM2IzefAr22CoXod0Bpj4YZkHo3qJ34lxjc7gWgaMXKuNlWPR-XJfDItbIp9ryoOIkSDI86Ea2H2bRIuZx97wYTzioPITAkcQGBHVpcwX_u6xpnI5zwiFA897-Xt5-Pz61Hm9lVSzS-iYuW2L378KqCaiTJ_Si3L72uOtw6nI46p5OGcf3PmHU_MkLOMkLOvpM90g_-_v7qj8J-uuKl_SAqmeQZ93hs8O_LK6S8ukay7v4H0125cA)

As you know, McCarthy is weak on holding the line against the Democrats' radical agenda, and has failed to provide the strong and decisive leadership that we need in the face of their constant attacks on our values.

I’ve always fought for the conservative principles that make this country great, the same ones that bolstered the best economy we’ve seen in years before the pandemic.

America’s best days truly are ahead of us, **but only if we stand up to the establishment and take back leadership.**

I can do this as a Speaker, but I cannot get there without you.

**[Join my fight to defeat Kevin McCarthy and usher in a new era of America First leadership as Speaker of the House>>](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdkUtvnDAUhX-N2YH8YGBYsEg6SVdZJpG6sfweN9imtlHEv4-NaCtFRhY-x5z7ca-a0TDC6_WKxqGRc48Z0qKxM4YYo7IwIQhO3aS50IjDiUDSi0mAHirH7NLpqFS-W_-hoiznvRPBNfcZScKR1oJfmOYQ9vCi-p4jJARD06DHZpnvOa8JkAeAn8uTlNii6j6tj0rWkKIxL3dujUn1nVMZPA2O6iypMKmNnvJI_3IC8sxc2HwG5IYvAA-xBkbrTRFy3FSRtuyoU9JurmgH_immsEWhiujFQplbF6v30xLlyKzxNfYo1B5EFYZlW4mW3a1W1FxGv3eDiuBNVCnRQhJSAQ7FYkb95z7LBJ_VAV8Q2j_Gr09y-x3fi039YmUxvol3K0v3btOLSaaXuImzXD_tstg0jGU65phOHcb5PzMYHwHGx2cYH33HWyZv7PX1Je6t_xXan5c3bKqJf5Q976v6d_MM6c6uYTDevgBtGbtT)**

Andy Biggs

subject: Peter, will you help Andy keep moving Kentucky forward?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
This will only take a second. Peter —

Later this week, we're approaching our final 2022 mid-month fundraising deadline. [**We set a goal to raise $10,000 before Thursday at midnight, and here's why this is so important:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55887313/383134226/1325899998?refcode=em22_221212_mm1_fndd_gq_act___TmBsh_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221212_mm1_fndd_gq_act___TmBsh_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2M2ZDBlYS03NTdhLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LmXlYxauTX-flwILTHlxPn_UN5wLr18B-6UNC-FJyzU=)

12 opponents have jumped in the race to compete with Andy for his re-election campaign. One of them already has Trump’s endorsement. Another is a billionaire who will likely be spending millions to attack Andy's record.

With the midterm election behind us, eyes are about to turn to our race, and we know it's only a matter of time before outside money floods Kentucky again to defeat Andy. We must reach our mid-month goal to ensure we are prepared for anything coming our way.

[**Will you chip in to Andy's re-election campaign before our final mid-month deadline to help him compete with his 12 opponents?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55887314/383134227/1325899998?refcode=em22_221212_mm1_fndd_gq_act___TmBsh_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221212_mm1_fndd_gq_act___TmBsh_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2M2ZDBlYS03NTdhLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LmXlYxauTX-flwILTHlxPn_UN5wLr18B-6UNC-FJyzU=)

Andy’s administration has accomplished so much during his first term, but there is still more work to do. That won’t be possible unless we re-elect Andy, and this is shaping up to be another tough race. That’s where you come in.

[**We know that we can count on you to rise to the occasion. Will you chip in to Andy’s re-election campaign before our mid-month fundraising deadline to help protect the progress we're making for Kentucky?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55887315/383134228/1325899998?refcode=em22_221212_mm1_fndd_gq_act___TmBsh_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221212_mm1_fndd_gq_act___TmBsh_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2M2ZDBlYS03NTdhLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LmXlYxauTX-flwILTHlxPn_UN5wLr18B-6UNC-FJyzU=)

Thank you — so much.

Team Beshear | | **Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Will you chip in today to Andy's re-election campaign?** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55887316/383134229/1325899998?refcode=em22_221212_mm1_fndd_gq_act___TmBsh_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221212_mm1_fndd_gq_act___TmBsh_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2M2ZDBlYS03NTdhLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LmXlYxauTX-flwILTHlxPn_UN5wLr18B-6UNC-FJyzU=)

| | Team –

We wanted to make sure you saw Josh’s message.

Families deserve answers, & they deserve to know that USPS, the USPS Inspector General, and Postmaster General DeJoy are doing everything they can to ensure that their gifts, mail, checks, veterans benefits, tax returns, Social Security checks, & life-saving medications are safe from thieves.

**Josh is demanding the USPS take action, and give families the answers they deserve.**

[Will you stand with Josh? Read the original message below, and sign your name here →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55887318/383134287/1181648004?refcode2=6adeca36-767a-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&refcode=JG_EM_EN_30DO_20221209_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWRlY2EzNi03NjdhLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VYWVoVDohRzltmnUn1aVMpRkHcZ1EvJeQ5y9FqpElYM=&emci=b4c4ba30-767a-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=6adeca36-767a-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=37438246)

* * *
_Begin Forwarded Message:_

Hi there,

**Last week, I was at the Palisade Ave. Teaneck Post Office ahead of the holidays to demand action & answers from the USPS.**

Gifts, mail, checks, veterans benefits, tax returns, Social Security checks, & life-saving medications have all been compromised by post office pirates and have cost Jersey Families MILLIONS of dollars. _It’s time we demand action and accountability._

[Families deserve answers, and they need to know that we are doing everything to protect their mail. It’s time the USPS takes action. Stand with me in demanding action by adding your name to our petition. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55887320/383134289/1181648004?refcode2=6adeca36-767a-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&refcode=JG_EM_EN_30DO_20221209_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWRlY2EzNi03NjdhLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VYWVoVDohRzltmnUn1aVMpRkHcZ1EvJeQ5y9FqpElYM=&emci=b4c4ba30-767a-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=6adeca36-767a-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=37438246)
| **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55887321/383134290/1181648004?refcode2=6adeca36-767a-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&refcode=JG_EM_EN_30DO_20221209_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWRlY2EzNi03NjdhLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VYWVoVDohRzltmnUn1aVMpRkHcZ1EvJeQ5y9FqpElYM=&emci=b4c4ba30-767a-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=6adeca36-767a-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=37438246)**

Despite continued reports of stolen checks & missing mail, the USPS Inspector General continues to tell us that the investigation will be completed soon. No more information. They told us that they would have a resolution on these cases back in July & they’ve delayed repeatedly.

[Jersey Families deserve to trust their post office and have their assets protected. Join me in demanding that USPS keep our mail safe from theft and fraud.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55887322/383134291/1181648004?refcode2=6adeca36-767a-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&refcode=JG_EM_EN_30DO_20221209_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWRlY2EzNi03NjdhLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VYWVoVDohRzltmnUn1aVMpRkHcZ1EvJeQ5y9FqpElYM=&emci=b4c4ba30-767a-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=6adeca36-767a-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&ceid=37438246)

clean_body: | | Team – We wanted to make sure you saw Josh’s message. Families deserve answers, & they deserve to know that USPS, the USPS Inspector General, and Postmaster General DeJoy are doing everything they can to ensure that their gifts, mail, checks, veterans benefits, tax returns, Social Security checks, & life-saving medications are safe from thieves. Josh is demanding the USPS take action, and give families the answers they deserve. | | Begin Forwarded Message: Hi there, Last week, I was at the Palisade Ave. Teaneck Post Office ahead of the holidays to demand action & answers from the USPS. Gifts, mail, checks, veterans benefits, tax returns, Social Security checks, & life-saving medications have all been compromised by post office pirates and have cost Jersey Families MILLIONS of dollars. It’s time we demand action and accountability. | Despite continued reports of stolen checks & missing mail, the USPS Inspector General continues to tell us that the investigation will be completed soon. No more information. They told us that they would have a resolution on these cases back in July & they’ve delayed repeatedly. | Thank you, Josh Gottheimer | Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. If you'd like to support his campaign =, if you'd like to unsubscribe Thank you for being on Team Gottheimer. | | = | = | Prefer to donate by mail? name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: The path to victory
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Just over a month ago, history was made when our movement elected Justice
Democrats Summer Lee and Greg Casar to Congress, where they’ll join the
Squad and fight for working people every day.

Now, it’s our job to make sure we can do it all over again — and we’re
asking you to join us.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123112?refcode=em20221212-26526&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=26526%2E1203867%2E-0Dbrw ]We’re just moments away from launching our work for the 2024 cycle, but
we need you to go all in with us if we’re going to raise the funds
necessary for the scale of our programs. Can you rush a $3
donation to JD right now?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123112?refcode=em20221212-26526&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=26526%2E1203867%2E-0Dbrw ]Contribute $3

The only way we’ll keep winning back seats for the people and sending new
people-powered progressives to Congress is with your help. We’re preparing
for the work ahead in 2024 — work that will take major resources.

It’s our job to set every Justice Democrat on a path to victory, which
means we:

1. Recruit, train, and support our candidates from day one as they mount
serious challenges to the establishment.
2. Defend our candidates on the ground and over the airwaves as
entrenched politicians, corporate Super PACs, and right-wing
organizations like AIPAC try to tear them down.

We don’t endorse our candidates and leave them hanging for the rest of the
cycle. We’re there every step of the way.

If we can get a good headstart on the resources we need for the upcoming
cycle, we’ll be in a stronger position to fight off groups like AIPAC who
want to stop our movement. Peter,
we can’t let them win.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123112?refcode=em20221212-26526&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=26526%2E1203867%2E-0Dbrw ]We’re in a small window of time before we officially begin our work
for the 2024 cycle and it’s critical that we can raise as much as possible
while we have this opportunity. Can you chip in $3 or more
and help us out?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123112?refcode=em20221212-26526&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=26526%2E1203867%2E-0Dbrw ]Contribute $3

There is no other organization that does what we do. But as long as folks
like you continue to support us, we’ll have a fighting chance at electing
more Justice Democrats and transforming Congress from the inside.

Thanks for all your support,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=26526%2E1203867%2E-0Dbrw ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=26526%2E1203867%2E-0Dbrw ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221212-26526-footer&t=1025&refcode2=26526_1203867_-0Dbrw&akid=26526%2E1203867%2E-0Dbrw

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=26526%2E1203867%2E-0Dbrw

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: Laying the groundwork for 2023
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, 2022 was a huge year for the Democratic Party, and for our country as a whole. We successfully defended our majority in the U.S. Senate, we bucked historic trends by avoiding massive defeat in the U.S. House, and we were able to hold the line here in Indiana by sending Frank Mrvan back to Congress. [**Our country is ready for responsible, balanced leadership, and this year was proof that we are heading in the right direction.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55887854/383135667/1643342139?refcode=221212-FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGUwNTBjZi03ODdhLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IrkFg1B-ZHrygDwU0ctRs_WmrwBerFjcktOs_2NFaDw=) **Help us continue this trend in Indiana in 2023 by supporting our organizing work with a donation today.** **Political victories do not come overnight, Peter.** They are the result of years of hard work, dedication, and commitment to our values. We’re proud of all the work we did this year to elect officials at every level, and we’re excited for the opportunity to win municipal elections in 2023 and flip as many mayoral seats as possible. **We have a chance to make a real, meaningful impact, right here in Indiana in 2023.** [**But to do this, we need to be electing as many down-ballot candidates as we can in 2023. Chip in to our cause today and help us build the Indiana we all want to see.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55887855/383135668/1643342139?refcode=221212-FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGUwNTBjZi03ODdhLWVkMTEtODE5Yy0wMDBkM2E5ZWI0NzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IrkFg1B-ZHrygDwU0ctRs_WmrwBerFjcktOs_2NFaDw=) Thanks,
